titulo: Spike Fearns Hair Shag Mullet

analisis_opcional: Jordan Barrett’stexturedshaggymullet(or shullet, as MFH has dubbed it) is just the kind of boyband-friendly look the kids are going crazy for these days.

titulo: George Russell 90S Style Curtain Haircut
analisis_opcional: With the search term “George Russell new hair” having 45.8m views, you can safely say the F1 driver’s90s throwbackcurtain haircutis racing up the most-wanted lists at salons everywhere.

titulo: Christopher Briney 90S Inspired Curtains Haircut
analisis_opcional: Christopher Briney’s90s inspiredcurtains haircut is a winner for its low-maintenance versatility and movement.

titulo: Drew Starkeys Hair Mini Mullet With Textured Fringe
analisis_opcional: On a scale of safe to hipster, Drew Starkey’s hair is more towards the latter end.

titulo: Nicholas Hoult Square Shaped Tapered Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Nicholas Hoult keeps things classic with this short, tapered hairstyle. Worn slightly brushed to the side, this sort of style works really well with naturallystraighthair.

titulo: Ryan Gosling Short Textured Cut With Honey Blonde Highlights
analisis_opcional: Often called ‘the most stylish man in Hollywood’, MFH reckons Ryan Gosling’s haircut is part of the reason for that acclaim.

titulo: Joshua Jackson Softly Brushed Back Back Curly Hair
analisis_opcional: Joshua Jackson’s softlybrushed-back,curly hairis a very flattering hairstyle for the 44-year-old actor.

titulo: Chris Hemsworth Textured Highlighted Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Chris Hemsworth’stextured,highlightedhairstyle is a great short cut if you’re an active person and don’t want the faff of having to use loads of product and style it.

titulo: Leonardo Dicaprio Inspired Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Leonardo DiCaprio, is that you? 90s hair at its best – thick, full and slicked back.

titulo: Donald Glover Shaved Head
analisis_opcional: While some fan forums have been gossiping about the reason’s behind Donald Glover’sshaved head(aka that he’s had areceding hairlinefor a while), MFH thinks he looks good regardless.

titulo: Paul Mescal Modern Mullet Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Themodern mullethas made a strong comeback, and Paul Mescal’s take on the style is a masterclass in effortless cool. The soft, natural curls on top contrast with the subtle length at the back, giving it a retro-inspired yet wearable appeal. This style works particularly well for men withwavyorcurlyhair, adding movement and definition. It’s an excellent choice for those who want a bold but laid-back look.

titulo: Colman Domingos Hair Textured Crop With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Short Textured Mullet
analisis_opcional: So much texture. A really great men’s haircut if you want something short but edgy!

titulo: Machine Gun Kelly Bleached Blonde Sweeping Fringe Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Never one to be afraid of experimenting with different hair colours, Machine Gun Kelly’s latest look is adyedbleachedblondehue especially with a  side sweeping fringe and choppy disconnected cut.

titulo: Wavy Mullet
analisis_opcional: The mullet is back in a big way! Working with naturally curly hair, this haircut and hairstyle is full of texture and movement.

titulo: Steve Carell Grey Side Swept Crew Cut Hairstyle With Beard
analisis_opcional: Steve Carell’sgreyside swept crew cut with a beard is as classic and timeless as the actor himself.

titulo: Jason Momoa Man Bun With Undercut
analisis_opcional: Jason Momoa’sman bunwithundercutis a big moment for the man with the kind of hair that makes him look like Polynesian god. Or, y’know, Aquaman.

titulo: Troye Sivans Hair Curly Highlights
analisis_opcional: Troye Sivan’s hair has form: he was one of the first celebs to rock acurly mini mullet, after setting serious trends with thislonger 80s-influenced style.

titulo: Manny Jacinto Hair Tousled Side Part Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Skin Fade With Textured Sweep Over
analisis_opcional: So fresh and clean! A great, contemporary option amongmen’s hairstylesthat is easy to recreate at home.

titulo: Damian Hurley Medium Length 90S Curtain Haircut
analisis_opcional: Damian Hurley debuted  hismedium length,90s curtain haircutonInstagram in Apriland caused a stir – because nobody expected him to cut his signature long hair off.

titulo: Blow Dried Back Medium Length Tapered Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: A blow-dried back medium length tapered hairstyle works really well with wavy or curly hair types.

titulo: Scott Eastwood Crew Cut With Texture
analisis_opcional: Theclassiccrew cutis a hairstyle it’s hard to go wrong with – and it lookssovery right on Scott Eastwood.

titulo: Brad Pitt Soft Medium Length Hair With Texture

titulo: Matt Smith Medium Length Hair With Semi Quiff And Side Parting

titulo: Robert Downey Jr Dyed Crew Cut With Low Fade

titulo: Adam Peatys Hair Crew Cut Fade
analisis_opcional: Adam Peaty’s hair was made for the winner’s podium.

titulo: Aryan Simhadri Curly Hairstyle With Fringe

analisis_opcional: Although Sebastian Stan has grown out his hair in recent months for his role in The Falcon and The Winter Soldier, we rather like his shorter,taperhairstyle.

titulo: Lucien Laviscount Close Crop With Mid Fade
analisis_opcional: He’s come a long way from Coronation Street, Waterloo Road and Celebrity Big Brother (which he entered in 2011).

titulo: Jeremy Strongs Hair Grey Crew Cut

titulo: Jonathan Bailey Softly Swept Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Will Smith Buzz Cut Hairstyle

titulo: Norman Reedus Hair Long Wavy
analisis_opcional: As Daryl Dixon inThe Walking Dead, Norman Reedus’ hair became, well, iconic. Although it was darker, a bit shorter, and shaggier, it still had that lived-in look we associate with Norman.

titulo: Tommy Deweys Hair Spiky Textured Cut
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Valtteri Bottas Bleached Blonde 80S Mullet
analisis_opcional: Nothing says “I spend a lot of time in Australia” like a man – in this case F1’s Valtteri Bottas – rocking ableachedblonde80s-style mulletandmoustache.

analisis_opcional: Harry Kane’sshort,textured haircutscores highly with MFH. Why? it’s good to see the England captain with a slightly more relaxed,tousled lookfor a change.

titulo: Liam Hemsworth Square Shaped Scissor Haircut Quiff
analisis_opcional: Liam Hemsworth has found his groove with this simple square cut style. Worn with a slight quiff, it accentuates his naturallywavy, thick hair.

titulo: Simu Liu Classic Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Chinese actor Simu Liu’sclassicquiffhairstyle is an ageless style that suits everyone, especially if you’re blessed withstraight,thick hairlike Simu.

titulo: James Nortons Hair Tousled Cut
analisis_opcional: James Norton’s hair is the stuff of rom com dreams:thick,tousledwavesthat look just the right side of bedhead.

titulo: Darryl Mccormack Cropped Afro With Side Part
analisis_opcional: Daryl McCormack’s croppedAfrowithside partis a classic look, beloved of Hollywood stars in the 40s and 50s like Cary Grant and Marlon Brando.

titulo: Jason Statham Shaved Head With Receding Hairline
analisis_opcional: Jason Statham is the quite literally the poster boy for thebuzz cut. But why change something if it isn’t broken!? He looks great.

analisis_opcional: Jacob Elordi’s hair makes a real statement: aka thatmulletsarestilla vibe. The revival has been going strong for a while, but Jacob’s take feels effortlessly cool rather than costume-y or ironic.

titulo: Sebastian Chacon Rounded Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Sebastian Chacon’s roundedcurly hairstyleis the ultimate style for anyone who wants to let their curls take centre stage.

titulo: Dominic Cooper Textured Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Dominic Cooper’stexturedquiffhairstyle is a more fun, youthful look for the man whose perfectly groomed, quiffed hair normally defines the word ‘smooth’.

titulo: Christian Slaters Hair Crew Cut With Quiff
analisis_opcional: Christian Slater’s hair fits him like a finely tailored suit.

titulo: Jason Derulo Multi Coloured Afro Mullet Mowhawk
analisis_opcional: Jason Derulo’smulti-colouredAfromullet/mowhawk(mowlet? mullhawk?) might be Marmite, but it’s also kinda fun.

titulo: James Mcavoy Greying Half Quiff With Swept Back Sides
analisis_opcional: James McAvoy, shows how to go silvergreycefully via thisgreyinghalf quiffwithswept backsides was the perfect classic hairstyle to set off that seriously luxe Dunhill suit.

titulo: Matty Healy Curly High Top Quiff
analisis_opcional: Controversial he might be to Taylor Swift fans, but when it comes to barnets, Matty Healy’scovetable curlstick a lot of boxes: They’rethick, glossy and versatile.

titulo: Adam Driver Wavy Medium Length 90S Heartthrob Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Adam Driver’s hairstyle in House of Gucci is a90s throwbackthat looks as fresh now as it did the first time around.

titulo: Tom Hiddleston Grown Out Thinning Hair
analisis_opcional: Tom Hiddleston’s hairline may be on the move but he works the natural wave of his hair to perfection.

titulo: Chris Evans Quiff Hairstyle With Short Back And Sides And Neat Beard
analisis_opcional: Although he said way back in 2011 that he was losing his hair, now, at 40, Chris Evans’quiff hairstylewithshort back and sidesshows no signs of recession or patchiness.

titulo: Robin James Medium Length Hairstyle With High Side Part
analisis_opcional: My first haircut of 2021 and the first after a year of growing my hair out.

titulo: Aaron Taylor Johnson Long Curly Swept Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Aaron Taylor-Johnson’slong,curly,swept-backhairstyle is the kind of long, dark, flowing, barnet you could imagineWuthering Heights‘ Heathcliffe with, or even Mr Darcy inPride and Prejudicehaving (well without the shedload of product he’s used to slick the fringe back).

titulo: Aj Tracey Two Strand Twists
analisis_opcional: AJ Tracey’s chin length, two-strandtwistsis just one of many cool hairstyles he’s rocked since hitting the limelight.

titulo: Daniel Ricciardo Curly Hair With Short Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: Daniel Ricciardo’scurly hairwithshort back and sidesis a striking look – especially in the first photo where his riot of natural curls look like they’ll barely fit inside his helmet.

titulo: Mark Wright Side Parted Quiff Hairstyle With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Incredibly polished are two words that spring to mind when thinking of Mark Wright’s hair and style. And though hisside partedquiffhairstyle with lowfademight be a look he keeps going back to, there’s good reason for that.

titulo: Kevin Alves 90S Throwback Curtain Haircut
analisis_opcional: Kevin Alves’90s throwbackcurtain haircutis straight, shiny perfection.

titulo: Adam Levine Shaved Back Sides With A Mohawk
analisis_opcional: Adam Levinepulls this style off with ease. Styled with the thick beard, it adds a really great juxtaposition in styling. Remember,low maintenancedoesn’t meanno maintenance. This will require regular clipper cuts!

titulo: Johnny Knoxville Medium Length Natural Grey Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Johnny Knoxville revealed his grey look during lockdown after years of dyeing his hair dark brown – MFH thinks it really suits him. He keeps things traditional in terms of the cut and keeps it long enough to style textured and with a quiff.

titulo: Harry Lawteys Hair Short Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: We love Harry Lawtey’s hair because it strikes the perfect balance between sharpness andtexture, delivering a look that’s effortlessly cool yet still polished. While his new characterHarvey DentinJoker: Folie à Deuxnails the courtroom look, Harry Lawtey’s hair shows off a more fashion-forward cut.

titulo: Sebastian Stan Medium Length 90S Inspired Hair
analisis_opcional: MFH prefers Sebastian Stan’s hair when it’s much shorter as it doesn’t swamp his petite facial features, however, thismedium-length90s lookwith facial hair is more relaxed compared to his usual clean-cut style.

titulo: Danny Fujikawa Short Hair With Side Parting
analisis_opcional: His other half might be the super famous one, but MFH wants to shine a spotlight on Danny Fujikawa’sshort,side-partedhair with subtlequiff.

titulo: Kieran Culkin Short Cut With Long Straight Fringe
analisis_opcional: If the 39-year-old actor looks familiar – and not just because of his role as Roman Roy on Succession – it might be because he slightly resembles his older bro, Macauley Culkin.(Who is 41. Yes, really).

titulo: Daniel Radcliffe Medium Textured Undercut
analisis_opcional: Daniel Radcliffe’smediumtexturedundercutisn’t his best look, TBH. It’s a bit harsh for him – we prefer thisshort, textured lookhere, which is sans the undercut, and is softened by the beard.

titulo: Finn Wolfhard Medium Length Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Although Finn Wolfhard’smedium length,curly hairstyleis a good look for the 19 year old Stranger Things actor, MFH can’t help but miss a previous hairstyle he had.

titulo: Lenny Kravitz Long Dreadlock Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Lenny Kravitz’s longdreadlockhairstyle is an old look he’s come back to recently – after toying with all sorts of hairstyles fromcornrows, totwists, toAfros.

titulo: Billy Magnussens Hair Wavy Tapered Cut
analisis_opcional: A Big Bold Beautiful Journeyactor Billy Magnussen’s hair strikes the perfect balance between casuallytousledand polished.

titulo: Timothee Chalamets Hair Short Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Timothée Chalamet’s hair hasn’t changed much in the last decade. But he might just be entering his grown-up era, and his barnet is leading the charge.

titulo: Modern Pompadour
analisis_opcional: Big fan of this look; and even bigger fan of the man behind itColin Petrie. This hairstyle is a classic that will never go out. Huge volume in the front is married with super-slick sides.

titulo: Cillian Murphy Tapered Hairstyle With Long Floppy Fringe
analisis_opcional: Cillian Murphy might be so preternaturally good-looking he can rock just about any hairstyle, but thistaperedlook with theside-partingand that floppyfringeis his most flattering hair look yet.

titulo: Mo Gilligan Afro Buzz Cut Fade With Line Up
analisis_opcional: Mo Gilligan’sAfrobuzz cutfadewith line up is a masterclass in barber skills. The precision! The sharp edges! The beauty of that fade!

titulo: Andrew Feldman Classic Quiff With Deep Side Parting
analisis_opcional: Andrew Feldman’sclassicquiffwith deepside partingmight be a safe look, but it gives the 21 year old Broadway actor a mature look befitting his status as a breakout movie star.

titulo: Munya Chawawa Cropped Afro With High Fade
analisis_opcional: MFH might be loving Munya Chawawa’scroppedafrowith highfadebut he’s not letting fame – or a favourable hairstyle review – go to his, er, head.

titulo: Henry Golding Textured Short Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: The handsome actor usually looks suave enough to make James Bond feel inadequate, but 35 year old Henry’s newtextured,short hairstyleis a softer, more youthful, casual look.

titulo: Deacon Phillippe Medium Length Soft Swept Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: He has won the genetic lottery (Mum is Reese Witherspoon and Dad is Ryan Phillippe) and Deacon Phillippe is a winner on the hair front, too.

titulo: French Crop With Curly Hair
analisis_opcional: A French crop is a fantastic option amongmen’s hairstylesfor guys that want a contemporary yet low-maintenance look. Sure, you’ll need regular cuts(specifically clipper fades), but it will be quick and easy to style each day.

titulo: Jonathan Bailey Textured Hairstyle With Side Part
analisis_opcional: Usually seen in britches with ginormous sideburns and a wavy, Regency hairstyle in Bridgerton, Jonathan Bailey’stexturedhairstyle withside-partthat he was sporting at Paris Fashion Week is just the right look to set pulses racing IRL, too.

titulo: The Weeknd Natural Shaped Afro Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: We rate The Weeknd’sAfrowith natural shape. It’s the right amount of retro and we love that he’s embracing his natural hair in all its brushed out glory.

titulo: Gary Oldman Medium Length Hairstyle Widows Peak
analisis_opcional: Gary Oldman’s go-to is a medium length hairstyle worn brushed back to accentuate hiswidow’s peak. He’s had many acting roles (and many eclectic hairstyles to boot!) but we’re a fan of this classic look.

titulo: Douglas Booth Long Highlighted Hair
analisis_opcional: We thought he was pretty enough to get away with any hairstyle, but Douglas Booth’slong,highlighted hairisn’t exactly his best look.

titulo: Ed Sheerans Messy Bed Head Cut With Choppy Fringe
analisis_opcional: Ed Sheeran’s messy hair couldn’t suit his laid-back, easy-going person more.

titulo: Hugh Grant Heartthrob 90S Hair Loosely Swept Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Hugh Grant’s nonchalant swept-back floppy hair was a 90smen’s hairstylesicon in its own right. Playing William Thacker in 1999’s Notting Hill, the actor’sclassicwindswept style is definitely one we’d recommend recreating now over 20 years later.

titulo: Hope Ikpoku Jnr Round Top Afro Haircut With Line Up
analisis_opcional: Hope Ikpoku Jnr’s round topAfro haircutbeautifully showcases his natural texture.

titulo: Ben Affleck Greying Short Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: It’s not a hairstyle that will set the world alight(5-star hairstyles right here!)but it’s neat and it’s well kept. Good on you, Ben!

titulo: Rami Malek Short Textured Fringe Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Short, neat, textured and tapered. This is a great hairstyle on Rami Malek!

titulo: Zayn Malik Hairstyle Medium Messy Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Zayn’smediummessytexturedhairstyle is the epitome of relaxed sophistication. It balances structure and spontaneity, making it ideal for men who want a stylish yet low-maintenance look. The layered texture adds depth, while the controlled messiness gives off a modern, rockstar vibe. It’s a great option for those withstraighttowavyhair who want a cut that can be both polished and relaxed depending on styling.

titulo: Kingsley Ben Adir Afro French Crop With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Kingsley Ben-Adir’sAfroFrench cropwith lowfadeshows that you can get that fringed, French crop look, even with naturally course, curly hair.

titulo: Corey Mylchreest Textured Wavy Hair With Fringe
analisis_opcional: Corey Mylchreest’stexturedwavyhair withfringelooks great with lots of movement and texture as per the first photo.

titulo: Brad Pitt Classic Slicked Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Micheal Ward Short Afro Textured Haircut With Low Fade And Line Up
analisis_opcional: If you look up ‘top haircuts’ in the grooming dictionary,Micheal Ward’s shortAfro-texturedstyle with lowfadeand line-up would likely be there.

titulo: Tom Blyth Tousled Caesar Haircut
analisis_opcional: MFHloves a choppy fringe and atexturedjust-woke-up-like-this finish. So, good jobTom Blyth’s tousledCaesar haircutwell and truly delivers on both counts.

titulo: Sam Asghari Crew Cut With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: The handsome Iranian met his other half, Britney Spears, on the set of her video for Slumber Party in 2016.

titulo: Drake Braided Cornrow Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Until recently, he seemed to be a fully-paid up member of the ‘solidfadefan club’, with occasional ventures into micro-‘Froterritory.

titulo: Bradley Cooper Swept Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Historically not one to shy away from trying different hairstyles (tight perm anyone?), it seems that Bradley Cooper always plumps for a trademark swept back hairstyle on the red carpet.

titulo: Damiano David 90S Curtain Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Lush, wavy and so shiny you can check your reflection in it – Damiano David’s90scurtain hairstyle is a thing of beauty.

titulo: Justin Baldonis Hair Curly Haircut
analisis_opcional: Justin Baldoni’s hair deserves serious recognition: hiscurlsare shiny and frizz-free, have the right amount of tousle, yet still look polished enough for the red carpet at the New York premiere ofIt Ends With Us.

titulo: Lukas Gages Hair Textured Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Lukas Gage’s hair effortlessly combinestextureand movement, creating a sleek yet relaxed look that suits almost any occasion.

titulo: Matt Smiths Hair Swept Back Mullet
analisis_opcional: It’s apt he’s currently starring in new flickCaught Stealing– because Matt Smith’s hair has ‘borrowed’ from a couple of eras for this new hairstyle, too.

titulo: Joel Dommetts Hair Classic Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Let’s face it – Joel Dommett’s hair always looks great.

titulo: Sam Ryder Long Blonde Hair With Middle Parting
analisis_opcional: Sam Ryder’slong,blondehair withcentre partingis theonlything that could distract us from his incredible vocal range.

titulo: Chase Stokes Medium Length Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Okay, can we please just take a moment for Chase Stokes’mediumlengthcurly hairstyle? The relaxed, swept-back look. The glossy shine. Bravo, sir. Bravo.

titulo: Nabhaan Rizwan Short Sides Textured Crop Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Short sides and a textured top is a winning combination look for many guys and it looks really good onAsianhair types too. It’s neat, easy to style and looks on-trend.

titulo: Theo James Cropped Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Theo James’cropped,wavy hairstyleis all about having a great cut – and a stylist who knows how to work with curly/wavy hair.

titulo: Landon Barker Curly Mini Mullet
analisis_opcional: Landon Barker’scurlyminimulletalmost makes himTroye Sivan’smini me – but MFH is fully behind a bit of hair plagiarism if it looks this good.

titulo: Ryan Gosling Highlighted Softly Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Ryan Gosling’shighlighted, softlytexturedhairstyle actually is more flattering than his usual, much shorter, ivy league/gentleman’s haircut.

titulo: Pete Davidson Grown Out Crew Cut With Baby Quiff
analisis_opcional: Pete Davidson’s grown outcrew cutwith babyquifflooks all the better for the fact it’s his natural brown colour.

titulo: Adam Levine Bleached Blonde Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: Adam Levine’sbleachedblondebuzz cutis a great look for younger men – if you can be bothered with the intense maintenance of it though.

titulo: Rahi Chadda Short 90S Inspired Curtains Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: One of many thingsMFHloves about Rahi Chadda’s short90s inspiredcurtains hairstyle is how that tousle and length add such a modern feel to a classic cut.

titulo: Tom Daley Tousled Textured Hairstyle

titulo: Bobby Cannavale Modern Textured Pompadour
analisis_opcional: Bobby Cannavale’s modern,textured,pompadouris more than just a hairstyle to him – it’s a lifestyle.

titulo: Aaron Taylor Johnsons Hair Short Tapered Curly Hair

titulo: Kit Connors Hair Short Textured Haircut
analisis_opcional: Usually fond of along, foppish fringe, Kit Connor’s hair even inspired an entire TikTok topic:how to make your hair like Kit Connor.

titulo: Joshua Jackson Curly Haircut With Short Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: His hair might not be a breaking any new ground.

titulo: Harry Shum Jr Loosely Swept Back Quiff Hairstyle Side Parting
analisis_opcional: Harry Shum Jr’s nonchalant swept backquiffis a winning look for those who like to keep things loose but elegant.

titulo: Tom Holland Swept Back Hair With Quiff

titulo: Tom Holland Floppy Medium Length Hair 90S
analisis_opcional: Spiderman actor Tom Holland’s hairstyle is reminiscent of heartthrob styles that were big in the90s. It’s casual, well conditioned and very versatile.

titulo: Giannis Antetokounmpo Afro Buzz Cut With Fade Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Giannis Antetokounmpo’sAfro-texturedbuzz cut withfadeis a style that’ll look as good at the office or out with mates as it does on the basketball court.

titulo: Mawaan Rizwan Caesar Haircut With Fade And Tousled Fringe
analisis_opcional: Comedian Mawaan Rizwan is no stranger to a strong look – he’s had everything from a bouffantquiff, to a bowl cut.

titulo: Dominic Fike Blue Buzzcut

titulo: Matthew Macfadyen Salt And Pepper Textured Crop
analisis_opcional: Matthew Macfadyen’ssalt and peppertexturedcropis a more fun and modern take on his alter ego Tom Wambsgans much more preppy style onSuccession.

titulo: Josh Hartnett Hair
analisis_opcional: He’s a former early noughties heartthrob who clearly has a portrait in the attic – but Josh Hartnett’sfine,side-partedhair with longfringehas definitely helped him hold back the years.

titulo: Suga From Bts Mid Length Mullet
analisis_opcional: SUGA from BTS’mid-lengthmulletmight be seriously on trend with Gen Z-ers and young millennials, but it’s the most grown up look yet for the baby-faced boybander. (He’s 29! Oh to havethat skin).

titulo: Dev Patel Hair Textured Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Dev Pate’s hairstyle is all about embracing natural waves and volume, creating a relaxed, modern aesthetic. The slightlydisheveledappearance adds character, while the well-shaped cut ensures the hair doesn’t look unkempt. It’s a versatile style that works well for both casual and formal occasions.

titulo: Marvin Humes Buzz Cut With Neat Beard
analisis_opcional: It’s hard to go wrong with this Marvin Humesbuzz cut– it works for almost anyone. The downside? If you’re self conscious about any of your features, it gives you nowhere to hide.

titulo: James Marsden Short Textured Haircut
analisis_opcional: James Marsden’sshort,texturedhaircut isn’t going to set the world on fire for being edgy or groundbreaking.

titulo: Jon Kortajarena Textured Dyed Blonde Hair
analisis_opcional: His face and his hair are his fortune (he’s modelled for everyone from Versace and Tom Ford to H&M and Zara), so MFH was surprised to see Jon Kortajarena with thistextureddyedblondehair instead of his classic, dark-brownquiff.

titulo: Skread French Crop With Low Taper Fade
analisis_opcional: Although MFH doesn’t think he purposely went for a haircut that was named after his country of birth, Skread’sFrench cropwith lowtaperfadehas that typically pared-back-but-cool vibe our Gallic friends are renowned for.

titulo: Machine Gun Kelly Textured Pink Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: MFH has called it – Rapper Machine Gun Kelly’stexturedpinkhairstyle is his best look yet.

titulo: Eddie Redmayne Heavily Textured Brushed Forward Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Eddie Redmayne’sheavily textured, brushed forward hairstyle is a fun, boyish look that works well with his revamped, more edgy red carpet fashion style.

titulo: Tobi Lou Long Afro Styled Bunches
analisis_opcional: Only rapper and TikTok sensation Tobi Lou could sport bunches and still look cool. This might be a hard one to pull off for the average man but if you’ve got medium to longAfrohair, why not give Tobi Lou’s look a go?

titulo: Adam Driver Medium Length Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Adam Driver’smedium lengthwavyhairstyle is a flattering length and shape for his rectangular face shape, and softens his angular features.

titulo: Declan Mckenna Wavy Modern Mullet With Undercut
analisis_opcional: Declan McKenna’swavymodern mulletwithundercutis the perfect way to make the most of his thick hair – while giving it a seriously fashion forward look.

titulo: Ryan Reynolds Medium Length Formal Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: It certainly helps when you have a face like Ryan Reynolds, but this hairstyle is for any guy that wants to look effortlessly chic. A classic style with undone texture in the top.

titulo: Tom Holland Short Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Tom Holland’s short,curlyhairstyle isn’t something we see often.

titulo: Steven Yeun Medium Length Hair Swept Back
analisis_opcional: Steven Yeun’s swept backquiffis a winning look for those with both thick and fine hair. You can add height and volume withmousseand control any flyaways withpomade.

titulo: Adam Dimarco Short Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Adam DiMarco’s shortcurly hairstyleis a sure sign of the American actor’s Italian roots.

titulo: Chris Hemsworth Quiff With Widows Peak
analisis_opcional: Chris Hemsworth’squiffwithwidow’s peakis a classic, stylish look for the 38 year old.

titulo: Brooklyn Beckham Messy Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Brooklyn Beckham’smessytexturedhairstyle is the latest look he debuted on social media recently.

titulo: Archie Madekwe Two Strand Twists With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Archie Madekwe’s two-strandtwistsnot only look fantastic, but this technique is also a great protective hairstyle forAfrohair.

titulo: Colman Domingo Cropped Afro With High Fade
analisis_opcional: Colman Domingo’s croppedAfrowith highfadeis a departure fromhis previous look– also deeply stylish – which  featured a hard side parting in his tapered Afro.

titulo: Classic Side Part
analisis_opcional: A classic that will never go out of fashion. A strong side part with volume in the front. Go for gloss with awaxorpomade, or matte with aclay.

titulo: Penn Badgley Shoulder Length Curly Hair
analisis_opcional: Penn Badgley’sshoulder lengthcurly hairstyle is a slightly longer version of what he has in the current season ofYou(spoiler alert) when he goes on the run.

titulo: Jxdn Medium Length Hair With Floppy Fringe
analisis_opcional: Uber TikTok star and singer Jxdn’smedium length hairwithfloppy fringelooks like he might have given it a serious going over with the straighteners in the 2nd photo.

titulo: Usher Bright Orange Dyed Afro Hair With 360 Waves
analisis_opcional: Usher’s latest lewk – a bright orangedyedAfrohair with 360 waves – is a definite show stopper.

titulo: Troye Sivan Hairstyle Curly Textured Fringe Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Troye Sivan’s hairstyle blends retro influences with contemporary styling, making it perfect for those wanting to push style boundaries while keeping things wearable. The definedcurlsand layeredfringedraw attention to the eyes and soften angular features – great for square or rectangle face shapes. It’s a bold yet approachable look that’ll resonate with creative professionals who favour individuality and movement in their hair.

titulo: Mark Ruffalo Short Grey Curly Haircut
analisis_opcional: Hollywood favouriteMark Ruffalolets his natural texture do the talking with this simple-yet-sophisticatedshortcurly hairstyle.

titulo: Lando Norris Hair Curly Tapered Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: There’s something refreshing aboutF1 driver Lando Norris’hair —and not in an ‘I use six styling products and have a hairstylist who travels with me’ kind of way.

titulo: Damian Hurley Long Hair With Centre Parting
analisis_opcional: Damian Hurley’slong hairwithcentre partingis the ultimate ‘because I’m worth it’ hairstyle, no? MFH thinks those lush lengths are just make for flicking around.

titulo: Gareth Bale Long Hair With Man Bun And Undercut
analisis_opcional: Gareth Bale’slong hairwithman bunandundercutis an acquired taste, but it almost seems like it could be a ‘security blanket’ hairstyle for the Welsh winger. Because rumour has it he keeps it that length to cover a balding area at the back of his head.

titulo: Jacob Elordi Hair Tousled Textured Waves Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Elordi’s hairstyle is a modern take on classic Hollywoodwaves, with a natural, undone texture that adds depth andvolume. The relaxed yet structured finish makes it incredibly versatile, working equally well for formal events or a casual, off-duty look. It’s perfect for men withmediumtothickhair and can be adapted to different hair lengths.

titulo: Billy Magnussen Side Parted Hair With Long Fringe
analisis_opcional: You might recognise Billy Magnussen from Bond filmNo Time To Die, Sopranos prequelThe Saints of Newarkand most recently as a villain in theRoad Houseremake with Jake Gyllenhaal which is on Amazon Prime.

titulo: Moses Sumney Platinum Blonde Afro Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: There’s no doubt that Moses Sumney’sbleached blondeAfrobuzz cutis a strong look.

titulo: Matty Healy Wavy Quiff With Sideburns
analisis_opcional: As front man for Brit band The 1975, Matty Healy’s hair has been an ever changing spectacle of cuts and colours. But although thiswavyquiffwith sideburns is his mostclassiclook yet, it really suits the now 33-year-old.

titulo: Jon Kortajarena Slicked Back Hair With Semi Quiff
analisis_opcional: Spanish Model/actor Jon Kortajarena’sslicked back hairwithsemi quiffis a slight spin on this year’s biggest hair trend – there’s a little volume at the front where it has been slightly pushed up into a quiff-esque style.

titulo: Ross Butler Classic Side Parted Taper Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: A classic that will never go out of fashion, this side parted taper hairstyle looks amazing on straight Asian hair like actor Ross Butler’s.

titulo: Jacob Elordi Short Haircut With Messy Texture

titulo: Mads Mikklesen Slicked Back Hair With Taper
analisis_opcional: Mads Mikklesen’sslicked back hairwithtaperallows that face with its amazing bone structure to take centre stage.

titulo: Travis Barker Head Tattoos
analisis_opcional: Sure, Travis Barker’s head tattoos might not be a conventional choice, but we’re here for anyone who chooses to gooff pistewith their style.

titulo: Lil Nas X Afro Twist Outs With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Lil Nas X’sAfrotwist outs with lowfademight seem disappointingly classic for those who love his more OTT hair looks.

titulo: Barry Keoghan Spiky Textured Hair With High Fade
analisis_opcional: He’s the Saltburn star who has caused quite the sensation, and IRL Barry Keoghan’smessy, spiky hair with that killerfadeis rocking MFH’s world.

titulo: Jamie Demetriou Cropped Hair With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Jamie Demetriou, best known for his comedic talent and slapstick humour, sports a haircut that’s anything but outlandish.

titulo: Channing Tatum Classic Buzz Cut Hairstyle

titulo: Pedro Pascals Hair Swept Back Quiff

titulo: Zac Efron Medium Length Textured Quiff
analisis_opcional: And Zac Efron’smedium lengthtexturedquiffis the latest look in his hairvolution – the man can carry off pretty much anything (except maybe the bowl cut wig he has to wear for his role as a wrestler in forthcoming filmThe Iron Claw).

titulo: Benedict Cumberbatchs Hair Tapered Caesar Cut

titulo: Adam Brodys Hair Short Curly Hairstyle With Sideburns

titulo: Gabriel Basso Textured Crew Cut

titulo: Travis Scotts Hair Dutch Cornrow Braids

titulo: Michael B Jordans Hair Afro Crop 360 Waves Fade

analisis_opcional: Nicholas Hoult’sshort,texturedhairstyle works really well on fine, straight hair because of the short, choppy texture that can be worn really tousled, or slightly more polished for the red carpet.

titulo: Rege Jean Page Bridgerton Mini Afro With Short Sides

titulo: Presley Gerber Textured Short Hairstyle

analisis_opcional: Zedd’stextured cropis a testament to modern grooming trends, blending structure with a relaxed finish. The short sides accentuate facial features, while thetexturedtop adds volume and movement. It’s an ideal choice for professionals seeking a low-maintenance yet fashionable hairstyle that transitions seamlessly from day to night.​

titulo: Fabien Frankels Hair Short Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Look up ‘suave’ in the grooming dictionary and you may well spotFabien Frankel’s hair. The smart andtimelessfeel of this short,textured stylesuits theHouse of the Dragonactor to a tee.

titulo: Orlando Bloom Long Curly Shoulder Length Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Thelongshoulder length cut is straight from his Lord of the Rings days, but still stands up today as a great look.

titulo: Manny Jacinto Long Quiff With Vertical Layers Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Full of volume and attitude, this is a great lookingquiffhairstyle from The Good Place actor Manny Jacinto.

titulo: Joe Keery Tousled Mullet Hairstyle With Side Part
analisis_opcional: Joe Keery’s tousledmullet hairstyleis as much of a fan favourite as theStranger Thingsstar himself.

titulo: Kieran Culkin Short Side Parted Hair With Floppy Fringe

titulo: Odell Beckham Jr Dyed Platinum Blonde Afro Hairstle Shaved Sides
analisis_opcional: The shaved sides and long on top look shows Odell isn’t afraid to try new things. The precise skinfadelooks very cool contrasted with the bleach blonde colour on top.

titulo: Leo Woodalls Hair Soft Swept Back Quiff
analisis_opcional: MFH sure is mad about this boy’s(Leo Woodall’s)hair. The softness in that gentlyswept backquiffstops it from looking too rigid or overly sculpted. Because, y’know, we’re not in 2010 anymore, thank goodness,

titulo: Brooklyn Beckham Wet Look Floppy Hair
analisis_opcional: The son of hair iconDavid Beckhamstyles his hair either with a messy centre parting, brushed back or slicked back with a headband.

titulo: Travis Scott Braided Afro Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Whether you know him for being Kylie Jenner’s Baby Daddy, or as the rap superstar he also is, there’s no doubt that Travis Scott’sbraidedAfrohairstyle is swiftly gaining iconic status.

titulo: Timothee Chalamet Curly Mini Mullet With Volume
analisis_opcional: Mulletsare seriously on-trend andTimothee Chalamet‘s curly hair look at the Met Gala is a great way to give it a go – without going the full 80s George Michael.

titulo: Damon Albarn Messy Textured Crop
analisis_opcional: Damon Albarn’smessy,texturedcropis just the right side of the noughties Fauxhawk (otherwise known as the Hoxton Fin – Google it if you’re  Gen Z).

titulo: Pharrell Williams Dyed Blonde Afro Buzz Cut Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: We really love Pharrell’s dyed blondebuzz cuthairstyle. Although the singer’s blonde is verging on brassy and we’re not wholly sure if that’s intentional, the style chameleon totally pulls it off.

titulo: Joseph Quinns Hair Buzz Cut Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: If you just did a double take, you’ve gotMFHfor company.Joseph Quinn’s hair couldn’t be a farther cry from the shaggy rocker‘Eddie Munson’ wigof hisStranger Thingsdays.

titulo: Joe Jonas Hair Textured Tousled Curly Crop
analisis_opcional: There’s an understated swagger toJoe Jonas’hair.

titulo: Serge Pizzornos Hair Spiky With Fringe

titulo: Ross Geller Medium Length Hair Swept Back
analisis_opcional: Alongside other ‘heartthrobs’ with medium length wavy hair, like 90sHugh Grantand Bridgerton starJonathan Bailey, Ross Geller’s style is back in fashion. Whether it’s down to the lockdown length that people can’t bear to part with or the more wider trend for men to wear their hair longer, it’s definitely a key 2021 look.

titulo: Andrew Garfield Wavy Quiff
analisis_opcional: With a head of hair almost as large as his acting CV, Andrew Garfield’swavyquiffand thatthickbonce is almost a character in itself.

titulo: Dominic Sessa Medium Length Curly Hair

titulo: Taron Egerton Medium Length Hairstyle With Widows Peak
analisis_opcional: Let’s be honest, Taron Egerton doesn’t make as bold choices with his hair as he does with his acting roles (Elton John, Eddie the Eagle… to name just a few) but we think this swept backgrown-outhairstyle works really well with his widow’s peak.

titulo: Toby Huntington Whiteley Classic Swept Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Toby Huntington-Whiteley’s classic swept-back hairstyle is giving90s-eraHugh Grant vibes, but with a contemporary twist thanks to those slightly shorter sides.

titulo: Louis Partridge Soft Textured Mullet
analisis_opcional: From a choppy punk crop as Sid Vicious inPistol, to his current on-trend look, a soft,texturedmullet,Louis Partridge’s hair is quite the scene stealer.

titulo: Jack Quaids Hair Tousled Curly Mini Mullet

titulo: Shawn Mendes Long Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Shawn Mendes’ long curly hairstyle is a move on from his shorter, more polished pre-pandemic pop star locks.

titulo: Sam Riley Medium Length Hair With Centre Part
analisis_opcional: Sam Riley’smedium length hairwithcentre partmight seem a bit like ‘don’t-care hair’ but that’s the magic of this style.

titulo: Evan Mock Soft Mullet With Textured Fringe
analisis_opcional: Evan Mock’s softmulletwith texturedfringeis one of the hugest transformations MFH has seen in a while.

titulo: Bill Skarsgards Hair
analisis_opcional: Bill Skarsgård’s hair in thisshort back and sidesstyle is a striking contrast to his dark and brooding on-screen roles. And that’s exactly what makes it interesting.

titulo: Pierce Brosnan Swept Back Hair With Widows Peak
analisis_opcional: Pierce Brosnan’sswept back hairwithwidow’s peakis a masterclass in classic, ageless hairstyling.

titulo: Austin Butlers Hair Tousled Quiff

titulo: Daniel Millar Tousled Curly Hairstyle With Fringe
analisis_opcional: Daniel Millar’stousledcurly hairstyleis a great example of how creative you can get with curly haircuts. Just check out the model’s next-level texture and choppy fringe.

titulo: Penn Badgleys Hair Medium Length Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Youstar Penn Badgley’s hair is low-key—thecurlsare cut in a way that there’s a little control without sacrificing any of the fun stuff – aka the texture.

titulo: Jonathan Baileys Hair Swept Back Wet Look Hairstyle

One minute he’s a dashing Regency rake with sideburns sharp enough to duel with, the next he’s wrangling prehistoric predators while maintaining his Hollywood shine.

titulo: Benedict Cumberbatchs Hair Short Curly Hairstyle

titulo: Billy Barratts Hair Shaggy Medium Length Curls

titulo: Chris Olsen Preppy Haircut With Side Part And Medium Fade

titulo: Nicholas Galitzine Slicked Down Side Parted Taper Hairstyle

titulo: Matthew Mcconaughey Hair Medium Length Textured Waves
