analisis_opcional: Charles Parnell’sgreyAfro hairstylewith length on top sends him shooting to the top of MFH’s Greynaissance Leader Board.

titulo: Alexander Skarsgard Short Back And Sides With Semi Quiff
analisis_opcional: It’ll come as no surprise that Alexander Skarsgard’sshort back and sideswith semiquiffis his go to hairstyle – because his fashion style, whether on the red carpet style or off-duty, is similarly minimal, yet classy and stylish.

titulo: Toby Wallaces Hair Short Textured
analisis_opcional: Toby Wallace’shair has enviable shine and health – probably because he had it cut extremely short for his role inThe Bikeridersand got rid of all the split ends.

titulo: Oscar Isaac Quiff With Short Back And Sides And Taper
analisis_opcional: Although MFH loves it when his hairstyle shows off his natural,thick,curls, Oscar Isaac’squiffwithshort back and sidesandtaperis the perfect, polished, red carpet look for the Screen Actors Guild Awards.

titulo: Chandler Bing Short Taper Hairstyle Gelled Back
analisis_opcional: The actor’s gelled back style looks a little greasy for MFH’s liking. But if you do want to create Chandler Bing’s look reach forgelor a high shinepomadeand work copious amounts through hair.

titulo: Austin Butler Long Beachy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Beachy waves aren’t just a hairstyle for summer asAustinButlerso perfectly demonstrates. Wearing it just below the shoulders is the perfect length for framing – and defining – Austin’s model features.

titulo: Bobby Brazier Jaw Length Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Although he had to get it chopped shorter for Eastenders (we’ll see him on screen in autumn), MFH loves 19-year-old Bobby Brazier’sjaw-lengthcurly hairstylefrom about a year or so ago.

titulo: Tan France Grey Quiff Hairstyle With Side Part
analisis_opcional: Tan France’sgreyquiffhairstyle is as chic and iconic as theQueer Eyehost himself.

titulo: Charlie Hunnams Hair Swept Back Hair With Volume
analisis_opcional: Charlie Hunnam’s hair inMonster: The Ed Gein Storywas a severe, unflattering 1940s look. But IRL Charlie’s now grown out cut Ed Geins cut shows how a timelessslick-backcan get a modern update. The added volume at the front stops it from looking flat.

titulo: Timothee Chalamets Hair Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: Timothee Chalamet’shair has long been inspiration for millions ofcurly-hairedmen worldwide. Those effortless curls were practically cinematic.

titulo: Daniel Ings Side Parted Hair With Long Wavy Fringe
analisis_opcional: Playing the disgruntled elder son Freddy, inThe Gentleman, Daniel Ings steals every scene – and IRL his long,wavyfringeis the scene stealer from this otherwise veryclassic cut.

titulo: Sam Mccarthy Long Hairstyle With Centre Parting
analisis_opcional: Nineties hairstylesare back in a big way – and Dead to Me actor Sam McCarthy definitely got the memo. We like the longgrown-outlayers, but Sam’s dyed blonde locks are little too grungy for MFH’s liking.

titulo: Pedro Pascals Hair Short Cut With Curly Quiff
analisis_opcional: Pedro Pascal’s hair is an MFH favourite amongmen’s hairstyles. That retro-inspiredcurlyquiffis a masterclass in blending vintage charm with modern flair.

titulo: Glen Powell Textured Tapered Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Glen Powell’stexturedtaperedhairstyle can be astousledor as sleek as you want.

titulo: Naoki Kobayashi Long Fringe Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: It’s a messy and lived-in look for Naoki Kobayashi and it really suits him!

titulo: Barry Keoghans Hair Textured Cut With Fringe
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Bowen Yangs Hair Crew Cut High Fade
analisis_opcional: Bowen Yang’s hair in thiscrew cutwith a highfadeis sharp look – apt for theSaturday Night Livecomedian who specialises in biting satire.

titulo: Pedro Pascal Wavy Swept Back Hair
analisis_opcional: Pedro Pascal’swavyswept back hairis a different look to his normal style – which is the  ‘I just rolled out of bed and ran my fingers through it’ kind of hairstyle.

titulo: Hugo Ekitikes Hair Short Afro Blonde Highlights
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Tim Minchin Long Red Wavy Hair
analisis_opcional: Tim Michin’slong,wavyhairstyle, is a more polished look for the world premiere ofMatilda The Musical– the big screen adaptation of the musical co-written by Tim (and based on the iconic Roald Dahl book).

titulo: Jamie Laing Bleached Blonde Crop With Choppy Fringe
analisis_opcional: He’s known as the ultimate cheeky chappy on Made in Chelsea. And Jamie Laing’sbleachedblonde crop with choppyfringemakes him look even more mischievous.

titulo: Diego Luna Long Swept Back Hair
analisis_opcional: Diego Luna’slong,swept backhair has quite likely been artfully styled to look so casual, but MFH likes a man who can rock such a cool, insouciant vibe and defy the demand for absolute perfection.

titulo: Richard Gadd Textured Crop With Undercut
analisis_opcional: Not only is he killing it onNetflix, but Richard Gadd’s haircut with itstousled, asymmetricalfringeis rewriting the rule book on cool.

titulo: Skin Fade Textured Crop Asian Hair
analisis_opcional: A mediumskin fadeand textured crop has become the go-to combination look for many guys and it looks really good onAsianhair types too. It’s neat, easy to style and looks on-trend. What could be better?

titulo: Jeremy Allen Whites Hair 90S Inspired Curly Centre Parted Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Richard Maddden Short Back And Sides Styled With Quiff
analisis_opcional: Richard Madden makes the classic short back and sides with a quiff look Hollywood cool. It’s thick, it’s textured and the brushed-up quiff makes it look modern. If you’ve gotthicker hairthis style is perfect for you.

titulo: Jon Hamms Hair Quiff With Short Back And Sides Side Parting
analisis_opcional: We love that Jon Hamm’squiffis a softer, less slicked down version of his Mad Men character Don Draper’s hair. Kinda like if Don were on holiday and left the Brylcream at home.

titulo: Niall Horan Short Swept Back Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: We much prefer Niall Horan’s light brown short back and sides compared to the spiked up blonde highlights of his One Direction years. Niall’s swept backquifflooks both groomed and effortless at the same time.

titulo: Connor Finnerty 90S Inspired Curtains Hairstyle With Undercut
analisis_opcional: Actor and musicianConnor Finnerty’s90s-inspiredcurtains hairstyle delivers a playful dose of boyband nostalgia, while the edgyundercutbrings it bang up to date. Oh, and that volume? Chef’s kiss.

titulo: Asap Rocky Hair Intricate Braided Cornrows Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Timothee Chalamet Medium Length Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Timothée Chalamet’smedium length,curly hairstylecurly hairstyleis a grown out version of themini mullet with volumehe had last year.

titulo: Harris Dickinson Modern Mullet With Textured Fringe
analisis_opcional: Harris Dickinson’s modernmulletwithtextured fringeis definitely not a look for anyone who isn’t confident about standing out in a crowd.

titulo: Danny Ramirez Long Curly Hair Slicked Down With Centre Parting
analisis_opcional: Seen most recently as Fanboy inTop Gun: Maverick, MFH is fanboying over Danny Ramirez’slongcurly hairstyleslickeddown with acentre parting.

titulo: Luther Ford The Crown French Crop Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Luther Ford’s tousledFrench crophaircut is a great example of how to freshen up a classic style.

titulo: Giles Surridges Hair Wavy Tousled Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Blue Moonactor Giles Surridge’s hair is proof that “effortless” doesn’t always mean “effort-free”. Luckily, most of the effort comes from making sure you get a great cut.

titulo: Sebastian Stan Crew Cut With High Fade And Texture
analisis_opcional: Sebastian Stan’screw cutwith highfadeandtextureis an edgier, harder hair look than we’re used to seeing on him.(As well as starring as Tommy Lee, he’s part of the Marvel’s film universe playing the Winter Soldier, complete with shoulder length hair).

titulo: Central Cees Hair Long Stitch Braided Style
analisis_opcional: Central Cee’s hair look – in these intricate stitchbraids– is more than just a hairstyle; it’s becoming a personal brand.

titulo: Bad Bunny Slicked Back Medium Length Hair With Undercut And Side Part
analisis_opcional: Bad Bunny’sslicked backmedium-length hairwithundercutandside partis a serious vibe – and MFH is here for it.

titulo: Rupert Friend Swept Back Short Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: He made a global name for himself as CIA operative/assassin, Quinn in Homeland for which he mainly sported a textured crew cut. But Rupert Friend’sswept backswept backshort hairstyleis a more suave, sophisticated look for the 40 year old actor.

titulo: Jude Bellingham Afro With High Top Low Taper And Precise Hairline
analisis_opcional: He’s might only be 20 but the Borussia Dortmund and England midfielder is getting rave reviews from big names including England manager Gareth Southgate to Man City coach Pep Guardiola. And Jude Bellingham’sAfrowithhigh top, lowtaperand precise hairline is just as on point as his footballing skills.

titulo: Tyriq Withers Hair Wet Look Tapered Crop
analisis_opcional: Tyriq Withers’ hair shows us how awet-looktaperdoesn’t have to be high drama to make an impact.

titulo: Benson Boones Hair Tousled Style With Centre Part And Moustache
analisis_opcional: With a relaxedcentre partand tousled90s vibe,Beautiful ThingssingerBenson Boone’s hair is hitting all the right notes. Plus, that thin chevron-esque moustache? Chef’s kiss.

titulo: Sam Smith Bleached Blonde Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: Sam Smith’sbleached blonde buzz cutis a welcome change up – the singer went from a pompadour in their early days, to a brown buzz cut comfort zone. And that’s where they stayed.

titulo: Afro Box Cut High Top Fade Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Personally we think the flat top has stood the test of time. It reminds us of Will Smith in the early days of Fresh Prince of Bel Air and it still looks as fresh today as it did then.

titulo: Cameron Dallas 90S Inspired Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Trends come, they go, they come back. Unfortunately for us, the curtains/centre parting look is back. For now.

titulo: Yungblud Messy Textured 90S Emo Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Yungblud’smessy,textured90semo hairstyle is probably one of his more ‘pared back’ looks.

titulo: Pete Davidson Bleach Blonde Messy Cut
analisis_opcional: Pete Davidson’s messy mop of hair is as iconic as his relationship status.

titulo: Seth Rogen Greying Crew Cut
analisis_opcional: Seth Rogen’sgreyingcrew cutis a simple tweak that has given the actor with the ‘eternal teenager’ vibe and look a push into adulthood.

titulo: Ed Mcvey The Crown Textured Short Back And Sides Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Ed McVey’stexturedtop with short back and sides is edgier than his on-screen character Prince William’s classicquiff– it was the early aughts after all – andMFHis so here for it.

titulo: Dan Levys Quiff With Shorter Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: We reckon even Elvis would be all shook up about Dan Levy’s quiff.

titulo: Robert Pattinson Short Cut With Texture
analisis_opcional: The former Twilight-er turned superhero specialises in working the kind oftextured, tousled hairstyles that would look way too ‘IDGAF’ for most of us mere mortals to get away with at work, let alone on a red carpet.

titulo: Ryan Gosling Tapered Fade With Square Textured Top
analisis_opcional: Ryan Gosling has had many styles over the years (side partings, slick backs, even bleach blonde!) but in recent years he’s been all about ataperfade.

titulo: Ben Whishaw Wavy Quiff For Thick Hair
analisis_opcional: Although his hair ignites extreme jealousy in most of us, Ben knows only too well that having one of thethickestthatches in celebdom comes with its curses.

titulo: Hugh Jackmans Hair Classic Tousled Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Team softlytaperedsides with plenty of top texture and, well, it’s pretty tough to go wrong. Case in point:Hugh Jackman’s hair.

titulo: Jack Harlows Hair Curly Mullet
analisis_opcional: From Michael Bolton to George Michael, musicians and their mullets were an 80s coupling that was relatively short-lived.

titulo: Kit Harrington Classic Curly Taper Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Kit Harrington doesn’t exactly push any hair boundaries with this curlytaperhairstyle. Sure this is a classic look, but we prefer Kit’s longer hair from his Game of Thrones days we have to say. But props to him for rocking guyliner here!

titulo: Junior Andre Cropped Caesar With Short Fringe And Fade
analisis_opcional: Junior Andre’scroppedcaesarwith shortfringeandfadeis a strong look, sure, but the 17-year-old’s features are youthful and soft enough to carry it off with panache.

titulo: Zayn Malik Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: A personal favourite of mine.Zaynlooks incredible with a super-short buzz cut. And bleaching his hair totally elevates the look.

titulo: Drew Starkey Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This hairstyle perfectly balances structure and movement, with its choppy layers and lightlytousledfinish. Theblondetone enhances the texture, adding dimension and a natural, beachy vibe. It’s an easy-to-style cut that works well for both casual and formal settings.

titulo: Miles Teller Short Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Miles Teller’sshort,wavyhairstyle is kept neat and short at the sides and back, but is long enough on top to be flattering and shaped into into slightly tousled waves.

titulo: Cillian Murphy Peaky Blinders Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: A classic hairstyle that’s been made famous by Cillian’s Peaky Blinder’s character Tom Shelby, this skin fade with disconnected top has been a much requested look since the BBC show debtuted in 2013 (how has it been that long?!).

titulo: Leonardo Dicaprio Slicked Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: It’s a classic and fairly low-maintenance style for Leo.

titulo: Justin Bieber Short Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: Personally, I thinkJustin Bieberis at his best when his hair is cropped short. He has a great bone structure which this hairstyle helps to show.

titulo: Jake Gyllenhaal Grown Out Long Hair
analisis_opcional: Sleek, glossy and full of natural bounce. Jake Gyllenhaal’s long hair works perfectly on him. It’s laid back and completely effortless. Don’t forget to condition and if you need to add in a little texture, use asea salt spray.

titulo: Charlie Puth Curly Hair With Short Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: Charlie Puth’scurlyhair withshort back and sidesshows you can have tidier, subtly tapered sides and back without sacrificing any volume ortextureon top.

titulo: Riz Ahmed Short Back And Sides Brushed Up Fringe Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Riz Ahmed makes the case for the classic short back and sides owning a place on the red carpet. This hairstyles is neatly textured and the brushed-up fringe gives it a more modern twist. If you’ve gotthicker hairthis style is perfect for you.

titulo: Diplo Blue Buzzcut
analisis_opcional: Diplo’sbluebuzz cut,which he debuted at this year’s Grammy Awards, is quite a different look for the DJ, record producer, and songwriter.

titulo: Liam Gallagher Mod Haircut With Texture
analisis_opcional: Liam Gallagher’smod haircutwithtextureis one of MFH’s fave looks on him.

titulo: Ashton Kutcher Long Layered Hairstyle With Irregular Parting
analisis_opcional: Long shoulder length hairstyles are back in a big way – and none are more iconic than Ashton Kutcher’s from the early 2010s.

titulo: Peter Dinklage Tousled Curly Haircut With Taper
analisis_opcional: Long hair, Caesar cut, man bun, mullet, straightened, dyed red, highlighted…he’s a man who’s had more hair looks than Madonna. But MFH has a firm fave – yes, Peter Dinklage’stousledcurly haircutwithtaper

titulo: Jake Gyllenhaal Hair Buzz Cut With Tapered Edges Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This buzz cut feels fresh, masculine, and unfussy — perfect for the modern professional. Jake’s cut is particularly flattering thanks to thetapereddetailing that adds structure and shape without the need for styling. The clean lines complement hissquare face shape, and the cut brings attention to facial features and grooming. It’s a bold yet understated choice that works beautifully for men who value both simplicity and style.

titulo: Matthew Short Thick Haircut And Style
analisis_opcional: Matt came intoRuffians in Edinburghfor a cut with Craig. He wanted a style that was contemporary but not the usual hard fade that we see on so many guys with short hair.

titulo: Michael Imperioli Grey Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Another greynaissance icon, Michael Imperioli’sgrey,quiffhairstyle shows he’s growing oldergray-cefully. (Boom Tish).

titulo: David Gandy Hair Classic Textured Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Wiz Khalifas Hair Long Dreadlocks
analisis_opcional: He’s had it bright purple, blonde tips, beaded tips, twist outs…    but MFH is liking Wiz Khalifa’s hair in this long, classicdreadlockstyle.

titulo: Ed Westwick Short Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Ed Westwick’s go-to is a short hairstyle worn brushed up or with a quiff to accentuate his textured cut.

titulo: Taron Egerton Crew Cut With Widows Peak
analisis_opcional: Despite the larger-than-life characters he has played, Taron Egerton’screw cutwithwidow’s peakis the kind of fuss-free look the down to earth actor prefers.

titulo: Brad Pitt Hairstyle Textured Side Swept Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This Brad Pitt hairstyle is a masterclass in timeless sophistication with a modern twist. The natural texture and side-swept styling make it an easygoing yet refined choice that complements hissquare face shape. The light layering andtaperedback add dimension, making this style adaptable for casual and formal settings alike.

titulo: Cillian Murphy Curtain Haircut
analisis_opcional: Lauded as one of TV’s greatest gangsters, Cillian Murphy’sPeaky Blinderscharacter, Tommy Shelby, has an iconic haircut – atexturisedcrop with severeundercut.

titulo: Johnny Flynn Tousled Mop Top Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Actor/muso Johnny Flynn clearly grew weary of his dirty blonde, polished style inRipley, so he’s grown it out into this “I’m with the band”mop top.

titulo: Raheem Sterling Tapered Afro With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: MFH loves Raheem Sterling’s taperedAfrowith low fade is a cool look for a cool dude.

titulo: Chris Martin Fauxhawk Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Less severe that an old-skool punk mohawk, but with a little more undone appeal than afadewith aquifforpompadour, Coldplay’s Chris Martin’s faux hawk hairstyle suits his relaxed attitude to style and grooming.

titulo: Oliver Cheshire Medium Length Quiff
analisis_opcional: Although he’s known more on the celeb circuit as a model and for being singer/TV judge Pixie Lott’s fiance, MFH has long been a fan of Oliver’sthickthatch.

titulo: James Anderson Mid High Drop Fade With Small Quiff
analisis_opcional: “I guess I’ve always been a bloke who tries to make an effort,” James Anderson once said – and given the England bowler’s roster of hair looks  rivals David Beckham, MFH believes him. Not all have been as successful, though, as his current mid-high dropfadewith smallquiff.

titulo: Leon Bridges Classic Tapered Afro Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Leon Bridges’ taperedafrois a masterclass in understated elegance. This hairstyle balances structured definition with natural volume, making it ideal for men who want a polished yet low-maintenance look. The soft, rounded shape keeps it versatile for formal and casual settings, while the gradualtaperon the sides ensures a clean and fresh appearance. It’s a timeless choice for men with afro-textured hair, celebrating naturalcurlswith a well-groomed finish.

titulo: Tom Grennan Curly Hair With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Tom Grennan’scurly hairwith lowfadeis an iconic, memorable look for a young singer on the rise.

titulo: J Harrison Ghee Asymmetric Afro High Top With Tendrils
analisis_opcional: J. Harrison Ghee’sAfrohigh topwith tendrils made us hanker for the 90s (Will Smith’s flat top erawas one of MFH’s faves).

titulo: Andrew Garfield Swept Back Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Although Andrew Garfield has naturallycurlyhair, he prefers to wear it combed back and neat for awards and events – often with a quiff leaning to one side.

titulo: Josh Bru Brubaker Hair Textured Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This hairstyle merges structure and personality — the cleanfadegives sharpness, while the voluminous, tousledquiffon top keeps things relaxed and youthful. It’s ideal for guys who want to strike a balance between formal and trendy. Great formediumtothick hair, this style offers plenty of styling potential and stands out for its on-trend yet timeless silhouette. Perfect for style-conscious professionals who want a look that translates from event-ready to everyday wearable.

titulo: Griffin Matthews Twists Medium Length Afro Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Griffin’s loose twist out brings volume to hisAfrolocks and styled with a smart bright blue tux, shows that the Flight Attendant actor really knows how to work a look.

titulo: Maawan Rizwan Quiff With Low Skin Fade
analisis_opcional: Maawan Rizwan’squiffwith lowskin fadeis a great way to give aclassic hairstylea bit of an edge.

titulo: Kodi Smit Mcphee Wavy Textured Quiff
analisis_opcional: Kodi Smit-McPhee’swavy,textured,quiffis a stylish but relatively understated look for him – well, compared to his other worldly, off-kilter beauty and flamboyant dress sense, that is.

titulo: Norman Reedus Long Wavy Layered Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Norman Reedus’long,wavy, layered hairstyle might need to look gritty and lived in for his role as Daryl Dixon in The Walking Dead, but IRL his groomer, Kristan Serafino, also likes to keep his hair looking lived in.

titulo: Timothee Chalamet Hair Textured Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Timothée’s texturedcurlyhairstyle strikes the ideal balance between relaxed and refined – perfect for the modern professional. The natural movement gives it a youthful, carefree vibe, while the subtle control keeps it looking intentional rather than messy. It works particularly well for guys who want to embrace their naturaltextureand seek a hairstyle that’s low-effort but high impact. Given the increasing trend of embracing natural hair textures in men’s grooming, this is a look that feels both contemporary and timeless.

titulo: George Ezra Short Taper Hairstyle With Side Parting
analisis_opcional: Never one to make a bold fashion statement singer George Ezra wears his hair in a short,taperedhairstyle with a side parting and brushed over fringe.

titulo: Lionel Messis Hair Textured Cut With Short Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: Lionel Messi’stextured cutwithshortback and sides is one of the better cuts in his hairstyle playbook.

titulo: Joe Keery Short Haircut With Messy Texture
analisis_opcional: With his character Steve Harrington’s gravity-defying barnet being a fan fave (it seemed to get higher every episode, especially in the first series), there’s bound to be a lot of guttedStranger Thingsstars with the advent of Joe Keery’s new look: ashort haircutwithmessytexture.

titulo: Anthony Joshua Afro Hair With High Skin Fade And Texture On Top
analisis_opcional: Anthony Joshua’s Anthony Joshua’sAfro hairwith high skinfadeand texture on top is a stylish, and sport-friendly haircut for a man in heavy training to hang onto his rep as one of the top dogs in the heavyweight boxing world.

titulo: Francis Bourgeois Mop Top Haircut With Textured Fringe
analisis_opcional: Francis Bourgeois’mop tophaircut with texturedfringeis giving MFH serious young George Harrison feels.

titulo: Thomas Doherty Tapered Hairstyle With Quiff
analisis_opcional: Thomas Doherty is blessed with thick, healthy head of hair and his taper hairstyle works with his natural straight locks perfectly.

titulo: Paul Rudd Swept Back Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Paul Rudd’s classic swept back hairstyle works perfectly with his naturallywavy hair. It’s perfectly finished with a high-sheenpomade.

titulo: Ashley Walters Hair Afro Crop Medium Fade
analisis_opcional: Ashley Walters knows that a solid haircut is all about balance — and his croppedAfrowith a mediumfadestrikes that balance perfectly.

titulo: Lando Norris Hair Curly Crop Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: The defined curls add natural volume and character tomen’s hairstyleslike Lando Norris’. It’s a great option forcurly-hairedmen wanting something trendy yet practical. Thefadeon the sides provides a clean, modern contrast to the textured top.

titulo: Ethan Hawke Textured Greying Crew Cut
analisis_opcional: Ethan Hawke’stextured,greyingcrew cutis a look MFH wishes he’d had done ages ago.

titulo: Raff Laws Hair Slicked Back Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Pairing gloriouscurlswith this cool pushed-back style? ConsiderRaff Law’s hair a surefire winner, whether you’re out with friends, on a date or, y’know, at a Hollywood film premiere on a Monday night.

titulo: Carlos Alcaraz Thick Heavily Textured Hair
analisis_opcional: The 20-year-old is the new king of Wimbledon – Carlos Alcaraz’sthick, heavilytexturedhair has also caught people’s attention.

titulo: Jack Guinness Slicked Back Medium Length Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This style is great if you’re growing out your hair and want the flexibility of wearing it retro and slicked back a la Guinness, or more looser and dishevelled. This is a great style for those with thinning hair.

titulo: Douglas Booth Straight Side Parted Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Aclassicbut casual, medium length layered hairstyle works really well with a deep side parting like Douglas’.

titulo: Matt Damon Classic Crew Cut With Small Quiff
analisis_opcional: The Talented Mr Damon was fond of a bronde(browny/blonde)curtain cut back in the early days of his career, but now he’s unleashed his naturalsilverfox he’s finally thrown off the shackles of that ‘nice boy next door’ vibe.

titulo: Ramy Youssef Short Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: He won a Best Actor Golden Globe in 2020 for the show Ramy – which he wrote and starred in – and MFH would also like to award him Best InCurlsfor this haircut.

titulo: Michael B Jordans Close Crop With Mid Fade
analisis_opcional: The Black Panther star defines cool. And Michael B Jordan’s close crop with mid-fade is surprisingly versatile and low-maintenance.

titulo: Jack Grealish Curtain Haircut With Undercut
analisis_opcional: Forget Jack’s ability to draw a foul and get free kicks – it’s his lush, shiny, swingy bonce that’s the talk of the beautiful game.

titulo: James Mcavoy Wavy Medium Length Grown Out Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: James McAvoy’s medium length wavy hairstyle at the 2021 (very) socially-distanced BAFTAs was respectable, but hardly award-winning.

titulo: Ryan Beatty Hair Brushed Back Taper Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This hairstyle blends traditional elements with a fresh twist.

titulo: Nick Jonas Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: This is a more stylised take on amen’s hairstylesclassic – a buzz cut. With a 1 fade into a longer top, it’s a great way to show that you still care about your look. It will take a barber slightly longer but it looks really great!

titulo: Timothee Chalamet Long Curly Hair
analisis_opcional: Work your natural curls like Timothée Chalamet has done. When using a mousse, work through root to tip and try using the diffuser on your hair dryer to maximise airflow across the hair.

titulo: Chiwetel Ejiofor Cropped Afro With Neat Beard
analisis_opcional: Chiwetel Ejiofor’s croppedAfrowith neatbeardreally flatters his round face shape. But then again, MFH thinks he could go for any Afro hairstyle and look amazing.

titulo: Oliver Jackson Cohen Textured Crew Cut With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Oliver Jackson-Cohen’stexturedcrew cutwith lowfadeis aclassiccut that looks great with Oliver’sfine,straight, dirtyblondehair.

titulo: Justin Bieber Caesar Cut With Choppy Fringe Met Gala 2021
analisis_opcional: When George Clooney made the look famous on ER in the 90s, the Caesar cut became a classic go-to for men everywhere.(Although it’s actually named after Roman Emperor Julius Caesar.  He apparently adopted it to cover up a thinning top and receding hairline, fact fans).

titulo: Alex Albon Short Hair With Wavy Fringe And Red Highlights
analisis_opcional: F1’s Alex Albon might have hisshort hairconcealed under a helmet for a lot of his day, but it doesn’t dampen enthusiasm for his latest hair look.

titulo: Marcus Rashford Tapered Afro Low Fade
analisis_opcional: We much prefer Marcus Rashford’s more casual grown-outAfrotaper than the precise skin fades of his early career. It’s much softer, cooler and signals his transition from footballer to fully-fledged national hero.

titulo: James Norton Medium Length Wavy Hair Loosely Swept Back
analisis_opcional: Alongside other ‘heartthrobs’ with medium length wavy hair, like 90sHugh Grantand Bridgerton starJonathan Bailey, James’ style is one that people can’t get enough of right now. Whether it’s down to the lockdown length that people can’t bear to part with or the more wider trend for men to wear their hair longer, it’s definitely a key 2021 look.

titulo: Machine Gun Kelly Medium Length Hair With Piecey Man Bun
analisis_opcional: Though his hairstyles can be a bit Marmite, you can’t say Machine Gun Kelly’s barnet is boring. And hismedium length hairwith pieceyman bunis the latest way he’s given hisbleachedbonce a little unexpected twist on the red carpet.

titulo: Brad Pitt Tousled Textured Hair
analisis_opcional: Brad Pitt’stousled,texturedhairstyle is the perfect cut for a man ofanyage – but on him, at nearly 60, it works with his face shape and his fine (yet lots of it) hair, and gives him a more youthful relaxed vibe.

titulo: Daniel Craig Hair Sleek Taper Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This hairstyle seamlessly blendsclassicand contemporary. Thetaperadds structure, while theslicked-backlength on top keeps it versatile. Ideal for formal events or daily wear, it enhances facial features and pairs beautifully with a sharp outfit.

titulo: Ksi Dreadlock Bun With Undercut
analisis_opcional: MFH loves KSI’sdreadlockbun withundercut– it’s fun, it’s cool, and it’s a great, protective style forAfrohair. And it added to his smooth AF vibe at this year’s Brits.

titulo: Jung Kook Hair Middle Parted Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Jung Kook’s hairstyle strikes the perfect balance between sleek and relaxed.

titulo: Justin Timberlake Short Hairstyle With Quiff
analisis_opcional: Just Timberlake(and his hair)has really evolved. From longer lengthblondecurls, to short and cropped. For me, JT is at his best with a hairstyle like this – a neatfadewith more length on top.

titulo: Ashley Walters Afro Buzz Cut With Skin Fade And Line Up
analisis_opcional: Ashley Walters’Afrobuzz cutwithskin fadeandline upis a great look – so sharp and stylish.

titulo: Christopher Chungs Hair Wavy Wet Look Tapered Cut
analisis_opcional: Christopher Chung’s hair is proof that a cut doesn’t need lots of bells and whistles to look sharp. But, much like his role inSlow Horses, there’s more going on here than first meets the eye.

titulo: Ty Dolla Signs Hair Long Braided Dreadlocks
analisis_opcional: Singer, rapper, producerTy Dolla Sign’shair is a cool, protective hairstyle forAfro hair.

titulo: Rami Maleks Hair Short Tapered Curly Haircut
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Craig David Afro With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: MFH loves Craig David’s naturalAfrowith low fade whatever day of the week. IYKYK 😉

titulo: Greg James Wavy Quiff
analisis_opcional: He’s the voice millions of people wake up to on Radio 1, but MFH has woken up to the fact that he has great hair too. In fact, we think Greg James’wavyquiffhas a bit of an old-school Hollywood vibe.

titulo: David Beckham Crew Cut With Grown Out Bleach Blonde
analisis_opcional: There aren’t many 46 year old Dads who can bleach their hair platinumblonde– which he did in July – and withstand the merciless p*sstaking. Let alone the scalp burn.

titulo: Sam Smith Classic Buzz Cut Hairstyle Thinning Hair
analisis_opcional: Sam Smith’s classicbuzz cutis as about as low maintenance as hairstyles get: the hair is kept one length all over.

titulo: Joe Jonas Square Shaped Scissor Cut Hairstyle Quiff
analisis_opcional: Joe Jonas has found his groove with this simple square cut style. Worn with a slight quiff, it accentuates his naturally thick hair.

titulo: Taylor Zakhar Perez Short Wavy Hair With Fringe
analisis_opcional: Taylor Zakhar Perez’sshortwavyhair withfringeis the kind of thick, glossy barnet most of us dream of having.

titulo: Nick Cave Long Straight Slicked Back Hair
analisis_opcional: If Reddit rumours are to be believed, Nick Cave has allegedly had a hair transplant, and possibly wears a hairpiece too.

titulo: Paul Mescal Wavy French Crop
analisis_opcional: Paul Mescal’swavyfrench crophaircut is a relaxed, easy going look for anyone withfine, wave-tastic hair.

titulo: Travis Kelce Hairstyle Buzz Cut Fade
analisis_opcional: A look like Travis Kelce’sbuzz cutfadeneeds regular trims to stay fresh. That said, it’s low maintenance in the styling stakes and ideal if you’re after a just-wash-and-go option.

titulo: Chris Pine Medium Length Hair With Salt And Pepper Beard
analisis_opcional: Normally known for his clean-cut, pretty boy looks, Chris Pine’smedium length hairwith salt and pepperbeardis a real change up for theStar TrekandWonder Woman 1984actor.

titulo: Jack Huston Wet Look Slicked Back Hair
analisis_opcional: Jack Huston’sclassic,slicked-backhairstyle makes him look like an old-school movie icon.

titulo: Kurt Cobain Long Hairstyle Centre Parting
analisis_opcional: Ninetiesmen’s hairstylesare back in a big way – and none are more iconic than Kurt Cobain’s centre parted long hairstyle. Kurt’s dyed blonde locks practically launched the concept of grungy just-got-out-of-bed hair.

titulo: Josh Oconnor Wavy Side Parted Tapered Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Aclassicsweeping, medium length tapered hairstyle works really well with a deep side parting.

titulo: Will Smith Afro Flat Top Fresh Prince
analisis_opcional: Personally we think this style has stood the test of time! Will Smith’s flat top from the early days of his career as the Fresh Prince of Bel Air is such an iconic 90s look.

titulo: Cam Cigdanet Modern Crew Cut Mullet
analisis_opcional: Cam Cigdanet’s moderncrew cutmulletis a two-in-one look.

titulo: Paul Forman Wavy Side Parted Hair
analisis_opcional: Amongst all themullets, and bleached/pastel colouredbuzzcutsbeloved of hipster actors and musicians ATM, Paul Forman’swavy,side-partedhair is aclassichairstyle that still easily holds its own.

titulo: Round Graduation With Disconnected Square Layer
analisis_opcional: This style is full of personality and is a fantastic way to add structure to curly hair.

titulo: Sam Fender Messy Caesar Cut
analisis_opcional: His new album Seventeen Going Under is out now, but we’re focussing on Sam Fender’s haircut. A cool take on a traditionalCaesar cut, this is a softer, more flattering look that’s immensely wearable.

titulo: Robin James 3 Back And Sides With Textured Top
analisis_opcional: This is a classic haircut with a contemporary twist.

titulo: Keanu Reeves Long Slick Hair With Centre Part
analisis_opcional: The centre part is back in a big way. Wear it loose and messy; or really hype-up the drama by using a heavy-hold,high-shinepomade(orwax)for a look likeKeanu Reeves.

titulo: David Tennant Subtly Swept Back Side Parted Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: David Tennant’s hairstyle is a more relaxed look than we’re used to seeing on the former Time Lord when he’s at a glam bash.

titulo: Idris Elba Afro Buzz Cut With Medium Fade
analisis_opcional: Idris Elba’sAfrobuzz cutwith mediumfadenot only showcases his salt-and-pepper hair, but it’s also a great way to disguise a thinning hairline.

titulo: Jack Lowden Short Choppy Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Jack Lowden’sshort, choppy,texturedhairstyle is a masterclass in good haircutting.

titulo: Zac Efron Bleached Blonde Long Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Zac Efron really does suit theblonde. Big fan of the dirty roots and big volumequiff!

titulo: Jeremy Allen White Medium Length Tousled Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Want thirst trap hair? Jeremy Allen White’smedium lengthtousled,curly hairstyleis everyone’s current hairthrob.

titulo: Joshua Jacksons Hair Greying Tapered Cut
analisis_opcional: Joshua Jackson’shair is serving what MFH likes to call ‘grown-man grooming’.

titulo: Nick Lachey Short Brushed Up Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Nick Lachey’sshort, brushed up,quiffhairstyle might lookthickand lustrous, but rumour has it that he’s joined an increasing array of celeb men who’ve had hair transplants.

titulo: Jeff Goldblum Hair Brushed Back Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: The brushed backquiffadds height and structure, which works beautifully for mature men looking to maintain a youthful silhouette. The silver colour makes the style pop and adds sophistication, while the glossy finish gives it that polished red carpet-ready vibe. It’s a standout choice for men withthick,straight hairwho want a smart, age-defying hairstyle that can transition easily from formal to casual.

titulo: Troye Sivan Curly Mini Mullet
analisis_opcional: Troye Sivan’scurlyminimulletis a more subtle version of the80s-tastic onehe rocked a couple of years back.

titulo: Matt Goss French Crop
analisis_opcional: Though he debuted a strange-coloured crew cut onStrictlyrecently, MFH loves Matt Goss’ altogether more natural looking,blondefrench crop.

titulo: Joseph Quinn Caesar Haircut With Textured Fringe
analisis_opcional: If it was a choice between his huge 80s wig(which has cult status)or the IRL Joseph Quinn’s shortCaesar cutwith that texturedfringe, MFH has to choose the latter.

titulo: Orlando Bloom Curly Medium Length
analisis_opcional: Textured, touseled and perfectly glossed. Orlando Bloom’s hairstyle is giving me 90s vibes. Cropped tight to the head on the sides, the focal point is all that body in the top.

titulo: John Legend Afro Low Fade Taper Haircut Beard
analisis_opcional: No one does minimalist classic style like John Legend and his tapered afro haircut with a well-groomed beard has been a favourite of his for a number of years. Sure, the US singer doesn’t make any bold statements with his hair but the result is understated styling at its best.

titulo: Harry Styles Hair Medium Length Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: This hairstyle is the epitome of laid-back sophistication. The tousled waves add volume and movement, making it a great choice for men with naturallywavyorthickhair. It’s long enough to experiment with different styling techniques while remaining polished for professional settings. This look has a timeless, effortlessly cool appeal, making it a strong choice for men who want a balance between casual and refined.

titulo: Lucas Bravo Textured Cut With Side Part
analisis_opcional: Lucas Bravo’stextured cutwithside partmight be aclassiclook, but don’t be fooled by its simplicity.

titulo: Daniel Craig Fine Receding Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: If it’s good enough for Bond, it’s good enough for us!

titulo: Rich Paul Close Crop With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: We might not know much about him – yet – but Rich Paul’s closecropwith lowfadeis just the kind of sharp, yet zero-fuss style beloved of a man who has bigger fish to fry than worrying about what pomade to use.

titulo: Rob Mcelhenney Short Back And Sides With Quiff Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Writer, actor, director, producer and now cochairman of Wrexham football club has definitely has a career packed with variety. He edges on the side of caution with his hairstyle though.

titulo: Shawn Mendes Hair Medium Length Curly Hair
analisis_opcional: Oh to have Shawn Mendes’ hair. Thick, full and curly. Work with your natural texture and curls and up the movement and volume.

titulo: Pompadour Hairstyle Full Beard Curly Handlebar Moustache
analisis_opcional: There’s nothing asclassicas a pompadour – whether it’s a mini pomp like this one or full blown Elvis height.

titulo: Jamie Dornan Short Hair With Texture
analisis_opcional: Currently keeping us all gripped in BBC One’s The Tourist, Jamie Dornan’s hair was cropped super short for his role as The Man, an amnesiac being chased by baddies.

titulo: Barry Keoghan Thick Sweep Over With High Fade
analisis_opcional: Barry Keoghan’s thicksweep overwith highfadehairstyle is a quite unique cut – which could be a bit Marmite for many people.

titulo: Jack Whitehall Medium Length Taper Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Sure this isn’t the most ground-breaking of styles, in fact Jack Whitehall’s hairstyle is a little boring compared to some of the other looks on the MFH directory. But sometimes you need a good example of a nice haircut your gran would approve of – and this is it!

titulo: Jared Leto Long Centre Parted Hair With Bleached Ends
analisis_opcional: Jared Leto’slong,centre partedbarnet is giving MFH Jesus vibes (well, if Our Lord wore Gucci and makeup) crossed with gothic surfer.

titulo: Jack Oconnell Highlighted Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: You wouldn’t normally associate Jack O’Connell with ahighlighted,texturedhairstyle because he has always seemed like the kind of laid back dude (with a side order of rough’n’ready) who’d tumble out of bed and not bother much.

titulo: Noah Schnapp Tousled Textured Hairstyle

titulo: Ed Westwick No 4 Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: His slick, suave Chuck Bass look was iconic, but Ed Westwick’s No 4buzz cutgives the actor a more grown-up, sexier vibe.

titulo: Jeonghans Hair Long Bleached Blonde
analisis_opcional: As part of K-Pop boy band Seventeen, Jeonghan’s hair is subject to serious scrutiny. And we meanintense.

titulo: Aj Pritchard Thick Curls With Taper Fade Cut
analisis_opcional: He twirled his way onto the small screen as a professional dancer on Strictly Come Dancing in 2016.

titulo: Joe Manganiello Mid Length Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: From red carpet formal, to loose and messy,Joe Manganiello‘s hair does it all.

titulo: Nikesh Patel Short Hair With Brushed Back Layers
analisis_opcional: Nikesh Patel’sshort hairwith brushed backlayersis a low-key look for the London actor who plays film-star, Tom Kapoor, in the heartwarming, but seriously funny rom com seriesStarstruck.

titulo: Josh Oconnors Hair Short Curly Hairstyle With Taper
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Zayn Malik Grown Out Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Zaynworks his natural waves perfectly. On Zayn, it looks effortlessly cool; on others it could look messy and unkept.

titulo: Shawn Mendes Wavy Quiff

titulo: Post Malone Caesar Cut With High Fade And Skull Tattoos

titulo: Brian Cox Swept Back Classic Hairstyle And Beard
analisis_opcional: Brian Cox’s softlyswept backclassic hairstyleandbeardis a seriously dapper look.

titulo: Lucas Bravos Hair Swept Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Lucas Bravo’s hair is serving up a more mature look: the 36-year-oldEmily in Parisactor(he plays chef Gabriel)usually has ashorter, more textured barnet.

titulo: Glen Powell Swept Back Short Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Glen Powell’sswept backshort haircutis a smooth look fit for a leading man. It flatters hissquare face shapeand suits hisfine,straighthair.

titulo: Luke Evans Crew Cut With Texture
analisis_opcional: Although he’s one of the many actors rumoured to be the next Bond, this  Luke Evanscrew cutdefinitely doesn’t shakeorstir us. Despite the fact that it’s a classic, timeless hairstyle.

titulo: Noel Gallagher Short Length Mod Haircut
analisis_opcional: This hairstyle does take a certain type of guy with a certain type of style to pull it off. But if you’ve got the mod attitude (and the wardrobe), go for it!

titulo: Lenny Kravitz Long Chest Length Dreadlocks
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Martin Freeman Naturally Grey Crew Cut
analisis_opcional: Martin Freeman’snaturally greycrew cutis his best look yet.

analisis_opcional: You might think Tim Schaecker’stextured hairstylewithlength on topis OK for someone who is blessed with thick, glossy, wavy hair.

analisis_opcional: John David Washington’s shortAfrohaircut – with that beautifully groomedfacial topiary– are winning him as many plaudits as his roles in BlacKkKlansman, Tenet and his current film, Malcolm & Marie alongside Zendaya (streaming now on Netflix).

titulo: Evan Peters Short Textured Hairstyle With Fringe

Ideal formediumtothickhair, this cut gives an effortlessly masculine profile that suits both smart and casual settings. With natural lift and flow, it’s a great option for guys who want a low-fuss but high-impact hairstyle.

titulo: Josh Duhamel Tapered Fade Brushed Quiff Hairstyle

titulo: Roman Kemp Medium Curly Sweep Over With Short Sides

titulo: Himesh Patel Messy Curls With Tapered Back

analisis_opcional: Justin Therouxpulls off this look with ease, but a spikyquiffisn’t a hairstyle for everyone and it could even look a bit dated so make sure the rest of your outfit is smart and on-trend.

titulo: Olly Murs Slicked Back Brit Awards Dark Blonde Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Love Olly’s more natural hair colour – it’s a bit more groomed than hisdyedplatinumblondehairstyle.

titulo: Jonah Hill Slicked Back Bleached Blonde Hair

titulo: Cropped Fringe Skin Fade

titulo: Robin James 3 Back And Sides With Textured Quiff
analisis_opcional: A sharp 3 back and sides with loads of length and volume on top. I really love the versatility of this style.

titulo: Phil Dunster Textured Quiff Hairstyle With Side Part

titulo: Olly Alexander Mullet Mohawk With Shaved Lines

titulo: Romeo Beckham Crew Cut With Tapered Sides

titulo: Justin Therouxs Hair Textured Crop

titulo: Damson Idris Hair Afro Crop Fade

titulo: Pharrell Williams Buzz Cut With Line Up

titulo: Dermot Oleary Short Scissor Cut

titulo: Antonio Banderas Caesar Cut With Short Fringe

titulo: Dylan Thick And Curly Hair With Fade
analisis_opcional: This is a really great haircut and hairstyle to make the most of the curls you have.

titulo: Lukas Dhont Short Slicked Back Hair With Tapered Sides

titulo: Olly Alexander Short Red Hairstyle With Blunt Fringe

titulo: Joe Jonas Hair Wavy Tousled Hairstyle

titulo: Giovanni Pernice Slicked Back Hairstyle With Low Fade

analisis_opcional: This hairstyle strikes a balance between formal and casual, making it a go-to look for events or everyday wear.

titulo: Joe Cole Textured Short Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: Joe Cole’stextured,short back and sidesis a good look for hisfine, gingery/brown hair because he can ramp up the texture if he wants a more tousled look, or he can even slick it down for a retro 1940s vibe.

titulo: Joe Locke Short Curly Hair With Length On Top
analisis_opcional: Joe Locke’sshortcurly hairwith length on top is giving MFHJosh O’Connorvibes.

titulo: Timothee Chalamet Mid Length Curly Hair With Swept Back Fringe
analisis_opcional: Timothee Chalamet has the kind of tousled, laissez-fairecurlsthat you just want to run your hands through.

titulo: Angus Cloud Grown Out Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: Emerging asEuphoria’sunexpected heartthrob in Season 2, Angus Cloud’s sharpbuzz cutas Fez was part of his appeal. After all, he’s playing a drug dealer so the harsher buzzed hairstyle gave his cute, boyish features a more dangerous-looking edge.

titulo: Chris Pine Long Hair With Centre Part
analisis_opcional: Not such a fan of this look onChris Pine. It makes his forehead look wider than it really is. For me, the classic sweep/push back is a far more flattering hairstyle.

titulo: Diego Calva Short Slicked Back Hair
analisis_opcional: Diego Calva’sshort,slicked backhair has taken a leaf out ofLeonardo DiCaprio’s hair playbook.

titulo: Ebon Moss Bachrach Textured Crew Cut Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Ebon Moss-Bachrach’s texturedcrew cutis a strong pick if you’re in the market for ashort, low-maintenance hairstyle that’ll pretty much let you just wash and go.

titulo: Robbie Williams Hair Medium Length Grey Mullet With Fade And Quiff
analisis_opcional: Robbie Williams’ hair in this 80smulletstyle – with its side order of mediumfadeand classicquiff– is not an easy look to pull off.

titulo: Jake Gyllenhaal Thick Textured Hair With Full Beard
analisis_opcional: Jake Gyllenhaal’s short,textured‘do makes him look less like a student who’sspruced himself up for a family wedding, and more like the the 43-year-old man he now is.

titulo: Richard Madden Crew Cut With Quiff
analisis_opcional: The last time we saw a pic of former Game of Thrones star, Richard Madden, he had a much morecoiffed quiff with a striking stripe of grey hairat the front. And, in MFH’s opinion, he couldn’t have looked more James Bond if he’d had 007 tattooed on his forehead.

titulo: Jacob Elordi Tousled Textured Hairstyle With Thick Fringe
analisis_opcional: Euphoria’s Jacob Elordi has come over all high fashion with histousled,texturedhairstyle with thickfringe.

titulo: Marcus Rashford Taper Fade With Line Up
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Andrew Scott Short Slick Hair With Quiff
analisis_opcional: Andrew Scott usually has more of atousled vibe– probably because it makes his veryfine hairlook thicker.

titulo: Tom Hardy Short Sides Long On Top Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: One of the distinguishing features of Tom Hardy’s short sides and long on top hair style is a disconnected undercut. It helps to balance out the length on top and is great for guys withfineor thinner hair.

titulo: Jamie Campbell Bower Long Layered Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Stranger Thingsactor Jamie Campbell Bower’slonglayered hairstylehas definite lead singer vibes (though ironically his band, Counterfeit, split in 2020).

titulo: Zane Phillips Wavy Mini Mullet Hairstyle With Side Part
analisis_opcional: ActorZane Phillipsisn’t afraid to mix things up with his naturallywavyhair.

titulo: Joaquin Phoenixs Hair Short Textured Crop
analisis_opcional: Joaquin Phoenix’s hair strikes a perfect balance between effortless style and sophistication, without being too formal.

titulo: Ansel Elgort Short Back And Sides With Small Quiff
analisis_opcional: Ansel Elgort’sshort back and sidesis the result of him growing out a shaved head, which he debuted on social media in July this year.

titulo: Alexander Skarsgard Cropped Hair With Swept Back Semi Quiff
analisis_opcional: Alexander Skarsgard’scropped hairwithswept backsemiquiffis not a groundbreaking look, but it’s Alexander’s failsafe hairstyle.

titulo: Prince Harry Thinning Hair
analisis_opcional: Whether you’re a fan of royalty or not, you’ve probably noticed that Princes William and Harry are both genetically pre-disposed to male pattern baldness. And Harry’sthinninghair is starting to look unkempt.

titulo: Ncuti Gatwa Dyed Blonde Afro Buzz Cut With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: You might recognise Ncuti Gatwa from his role as gay teen Eric Effiong in popular Netflix seriesSex Education. But to make an extra splash after his Dr Who announcement, Ncuti showed up at the BAFTA TV awards with thisdyedblondeAfrobuzz cutwith lowfade. And he has this look in the Barbie film!

titulo: Paul Dano Softly Swept Back Hair
analisis_opcional: Paul Dano’s softlyswept-backhairstyle is the perfect in-betweeny look.

titulo: Jack Dylan Grazer Medium Length Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Jack’s full head of bouncy curls is such a fun, joyous style but medium length to longcurlyhairstyles like this do require a bit of maintenance.

titulo: Robert Pattinson Messy Bed Head
analisis_opcional: Robert Pattinson’smessybed headfeels like an appropriately ‘zero f*cks given’ look for the man who once admitted that he didn’t wash his hair for six weeks (and rumour has it, he didn’t shower particularly often in his Twilight days, either).

titulo: Jelani Alladin Short High Top Afro Hairstyle With Tapered Sides
analisis_opcional: Jelani Alladin’s short high-top Afro with tapered sides is a total showstopper.

titulo: Hu Bing Formal Sleek Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Refined, polished and fairly low maintenance; I really love this classic hairstyle on Hu Bing.

titulo: Sam Worthingtons Hair Classic Crew Cut
analisis_opcional: Aussie Actor Sam Worthington’s hair in this fresh-looking,classiccrew cut, is like the white T-shirt of hairstyles: simple, timeless, and universally flattering.

titulo: Florian Munteanus Hair Medium Length Man Bun
analisis_opcional: We’re calling it: we think Florian Munteanu’s hair is the perfect way to style your barnet when you’re growing out a shorter hairstyle.

titulo: Jared Leto Long And Textured
analisis_opcional: Jared Letohas tried just about every haircut and hairstyle but his long look is his most iconic. Particularly fond of his ombré(dip dye style)look especially for the warmer months.

titulo: Dpharaoh Woon A Tais Hair Long Wavy Haircut With Centre Part
analisis_opcional: Tousled waves + volume + a classic centre part = the triple-threat appeal of rising star D’Pharaoh Woon-A-Tai’s hair.

titulo: Joel Dommett Quiff Haircut With Medium Fade
analisis_opcional: After his wife Hannah attempted a DIY haircut and colour on him in lockdown, Joel ended up with a chunk taken out and suspiciously gingery tones.

titulo: Joe Wicks Curly Shoulder Length Hair
analisis_opcional: He got the nation’s kids, and their parents(especially the lust-ridden mums), star-jumping and high-kneeing their way through the pandemic with his daily fitness classes.

titulo: Evan Mock Pink Buzz Cut
analisis_opcional: Sure, this look isn’t for everyone, but Evan Mock’s pinkbuzz cuthad real standout on the Met Gala’s red carpet. A pretty amazing feat considering the wow factor guests all around him!

titulo: Sonny Hall Medium Length Wavy Hair Styled With Wet Look
analisis_opcional: Medium length wavy hair can be tricky to style but you could always reach for the wet-lookpomadelike Sonny Hall.

titulo: Adam Levine Crew Cut With High Fade
analisis_opcional: MFH is always intrigued by a new Adam Levine haircut.

titulo: Olly Alexander 80S Bouffant Curly Crop Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: We can’t get enough of Olly Alexander’s It’s A Sin hairstyle. To play Ritchie Tozer in the Channel 4 series, the Years and Years frontman has departed from his usual short French crop and gone for a longer retro look that embraces his natural curls. And we heartily approve!

titulo: Yungbluds Hair Centre Parted Slicked Back Style
analisis_opcional: Yungblud’shair in this style is, at its core, a vintage vibe with a modern twist. MFH’s take? Elvis meets emo, with a dash of Camden grit.

titulo: Stefanos Tsitsipas Mid Length Curly Hair With Half Bun
analisis_opcional: Stefanos Tsitsipas’mid-length curly hairis oft talked about – he’s even been asked about it in post-match press conferences.

titulo: Slowthai Short Fade Hairstyle With Square Fringe
analisis_opcional: Slowthai certainly makes a statement with his shortfringeandfadecombo. Just like the rapper himself it’s edgy, blunt and a bit rock and roll.

titulo: Harry Styles Medium Length Curly Hairstyle With Brushed Back Fringe
analisis_opcional: There’s a reason Harry Styles loves thismedium lengthcurly hairstylewithswept back fringe.And MFH thinks it’s because it’s an easy style that doesn’t need much styling.

titulo: Michael Fassbender Textured French Crop
analisis_opcional: Michael Fassbender’stexturedfrench cropis an easy care style.

titulo: Dwayne Johnson Bald Shaved Head
analisis_opcional: When you think of Dwayne Johnson you think of muscles so big they could have their own postcode, but you also think ‘bald shaved head‘ because it’s a look as strong as his biceps.

titulo: Ricky Martin Textured Pompadour Hairstyle With High Fade And Full Beard
analisis_opcional: Latino singer, Ricky Martin, 52, is back in the news again with his role in the Apple TV+ seriesPalm Royale. And his stylish haircut, in this shortpompadourwith highfadehelps him maintain that youthful visage.

titulo: Cristiano Ronaldo Grown Out Long Hairstyle Styled Man Bun
analisis_opcional: We much prefer Cristiano Ronaldo’s casualgrown-outlook to his precisebuzz cuthairstyle. It’s laidback, relaxed and shows more of his sporty side.

titulo: Andrew Rannells Medium Length Quiff Hairstyle With Side Parting
analisis_opcional: Andrew Rannells’ nonchalant swept backquiffis a winning look for those who like to keep things loose but elegant.

titulo: Yeonjuns Hair 90S Inspired Curtain Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Yeonjun’shair hits the perfect sweet spot between retro and red-carpet ready.

titulo: Austin Butler Soft Wavy Mullet
analisis_opcional: Austin Butler’ssoft,wavymulletis the latest in a long line of looks from this hairstyle chameleon. Austin’s hair has been everything fromraven black curtains, tolong, blonde surfer waves, 50s-inspired quiffs, and that sweep-over look favoured by a teenage Justin Bieber.

titulo: Percy Hynes White Long Slicked Back Hair
analisis_opcional: Percy Hynes White’slong,slicked-back hairhas not just upped his goth creds, but it has given him a leading role as fashion’s new It Boy too.

titulo: Arthur Contis Hair Curly Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Arthur Conti’s hair has a distinctly gothic vibe. Hiscurlyhair which is naturally a rich brown, has beendyedblack. Possibly a leftover habit from his time on goth-com filmBeetlejuice Beetlejuice?

titulo: John Boyega Cornrow Braided Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: John Boyegais a style icon and effortlessly owns his look. His grooming is immaculate and his hair is perfection.

titulo: Robin James 4 Back And Sides With Medium Length Textured Top
analisis_opcional: I love having this style. It’s one of the easiermen’s hairstylesto maintain and you can go as messy or as neat as you like. See what to ask your barber below!

titulo: Lil Teccas Hair Medium Length Dreadlocks
analisis_opcional: Lil Tecca’s hair – collar-bone lengthdreadlocks– is a style evolution his fans have been carefully watching.

titulo: Jonathan Bailey Anthony Bridgerton Wavy Side Parted Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Wonderfully wavy and paired with enviable sideburns, Jonathan Bailey’s side parted style will be a hot request at the barbers thanks to his role as Anthony Bridgerton in Netlfix hit Bridgerton.

titulo: Dino Fetscher Side Swept Crew Cut Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: MFHis all about the neat, classic simplicity ofDino Fetscher’s side swept crew cut.

titulo: Armie Hammer Swept Back Short Wavy Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: TheCall Me By Your Nameactor wears awavy, slightly preppy hairstyle that appears to fall perfectly into curl at the front and is slicked back around the sides. It’s perfectly finished with a high-sheenpomade.

titulo: Cole Escola Choppy Textured Hair With Fringe
analisis_opcional: Cole Escola’sshort, choppy,texturedcut gives the hair volume and movement so it’s perfect for anyone withfine hair.

titulo: Zac Efrons Hair Short Crop Haircut
analisis_opcional: Zac Efron’s hair has seen a fair few styles in its time – fromclassic quifftobleached and gravity defying– but this short crop haircut is one of the actor’s most easygoing, low maintenance looks yet.

titulo: Liam Payne New Hairstyle Long On Top Quiff
analisis_opcional: Full of volume and attitude, this is a great lookingquiffhairstyle from Liam Payne.

titulo: Liam Gallaghers Hair Mod Inspired Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Liam Gallagher’s hair has always been iconic – the man has the knack of carrying off everything from abuzz cutwith heavy sideburns tolong, straight andcentre-parted, or a heavilytexturedmod look with longer pieces at the sides.

titulo: Jack Saunders Red And Black Dyed Textured Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Jack Saunders’ red and blackdyed,texturedhairstyle is a long way removed from the conservative looking young bloke with a halo of gingery-blonde hair and a floppy,curtainfringe.

titulo: Jared Leto Long Tousled Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: He’s totally unrecognisable in his new film, House of Gucci, hidden under layers of prosthetics and a receding hairline as Paolo Gucci.

titulo: Mark Ronson Retro Pompadour Quiff
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: William Gao Brushed Back 90S Inspired Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: William Gao’sbrushed back90s inspiredhairstyle is a shorter take on his Heartstopper character’s Season 1 hair.

titulo: G Dragon Multi Coloured Mid Length Mullet
analisis_opcional: The South Korean A-lister — real name Kwon Ji-yong — not only has the best shaggy, multi-colouredmid-lengthmulletaround (which is also called the ‘wolf haircut’) but he has the fashion creds to back it up, too.

titulo: Jay Z Freeform Dreadlocks With Congos
analisis_opcional: Jay-Z’s freeform dreadlocks with congos (which mean joining two or more locs so they fuse together) may not take much in the way of maintenance, but he had to grow hisafrohair a bit longer, first.

titulo: Chase Stokes Medium Length 90S Curtain Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: The 30-year-oldOuter Banksactor Chase Stokes proves the resurgence of themedium-length,90s classic curtain haircutisn’t just a trend; it’s a full-on revival.

titulo: Sam Thompson Wavy High Fade
analisis_opcional: One of reality TV’s most famous cheeky-chappies, Sam Thompson’s wavy highfadeis a much harsher look for him than usual.

titulo: Trevor Noah Cornrow Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Trevor Noah’s cornrow hairstyle is a winning style forAfro hair, but those beautifully precisebraidsare not something to take on yourself if you’re lacking in patience. Or time.

titulo: High Top Afro
analisis_opcional: Valerio Federico shows his artistic talent with this high top afro. The juxtaposition of super-sharp fade with a voluminous top is pure perfection.

titulo: Anthony Keyvan Curly Hairstyle With Short Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: Anthony Keyvan’scurly hairstylewith short back and sides proves that sharp tapering and glorious curls really are a dream power couple.

titulo: Jude Law Medium Length With Receding Hairline
analisis_opcional: Man For Himself is run by Robin James – men’s grooming and lifestyle creator.

titulo: Oscar Piastris Hair Short Wavy Cut With Soft Quiff
analisis_opcional: Oscar Piastri’s hair is the perfect option for all youwavy-hairedgents who want to look sharp without spending ages in the garage (read: bathroom).

titulo: Frank Ocean Buzz Cut Hairstyle On Afro Hair
analisis_opcional: Frank Ocean’s Afrobuzz cutalways look so effortless but seriously cool at the same time. How? Well, it might have something to do with the fact that it’s both casual andclassicat the same time. And so smart that Frank even sported a buzz cut to the Met Gala back in 2019. It’s a look that all guys should try once (but, bumpy heads beware!)

titulo: Kendrick Lamar Hair Short Afro Hairstyle
Tom Daley Soft Caesar Cut
analisis_opcional: We’re used to seeing Tom’s hair looking all messy and dripping with pool water, so this artfully tousled red carpet look feels like a real departure.

titulo: Lil Nas X High Top Twist With Traditional Fade And Precise Hairline
analisis_opcional: Always experimental with his hair, this Lil Nas X high-top twist is one of his more understated styles. We like that his fade is subtle, but the meticulous hairline detail makes it a strong look.

titulo: Cillian Murphy Textured Greying Curtain Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Cillian Murphy’stexturedgreyingcurtainhairstyle at theOppenheimerpremiere is a big departure from his iconic – and harsh –Peaky Blinders look.

titulo: Jacob Sartorius Messy Bedhead Mullet With Bleached Ends
analisis_opcional: With nearly24m followers on TikTok,10.6m on Instagram, and2.6m YouTube subscribers, it’s safe to say that 19-year-old Jacob Sartorius’ online fame is even huger than his bouffant,messybedheadmulletwithbleached ends.

titulo: Mark Ronson Curly Quiff Pompadour Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Mark Ronson has rocked a curly pompadour quiff ever since he broke into the music industry circa the mid-noughties. And just like his music, his hairstyle is a little retro but with all the markings of aclassic. Essential tools to invest in if you want a quiff? Ahairdryerand a vent brush.

titulo: Josh Heuston Medium Length Curly Hair
analisis_opcional: Aside from his incredible aesthetic appeal (he’s the flame emoji personified, no?), Josh Heuston’smedium-lengthcurlyhair caught MFH’s eye because it has serious Leading Man Energy.

titulo: Daniel Kaluuya Cropped Afro With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: He’s might be an Oscar nominated, BAFTA-award winning actor, but MFH votes Daniel Kaluuya’s croppedAfrowith lowfade– and his fashion style – as the red carpet winners at this year’s BAFTAs.

titulo: Will Sharpe Slicked Back Curly Hair With Strong Side Part
analisis_opcional: We bet evenWhite Lotusstar [he played tech nerd Ethan] Will Sharpe didn’t think his thick,curlyhair would look so damn good in aslicked backstyle with a severeside part.

titulo: Chris Hemsworth Widows Peak Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Chris Hemsworth’s hairstyle works perfectly for his widow’s peak. Volume in the front, with the sides left loose and full of texture.

titulo: Aitch High And Tight Buzz Cut With Skin Fade
analisis_opcional: Aitch’s high and tightbuzz cutwithskin fademight look simple, but it’s a precision look and best left to a barber/hairstylist that has the right hair trimmers, razors and, crucially, skillz.

titulo: Sang Woo Kim Bleach Blonde Short Hair
analisis_opcional: From the tinted glasses to the ashblondehair,Sang Woo Kimlooks effortlessly cool. Asian hair can be difficult to dye(dye well!), so make sure you go to a salon that really does know what they’re doing.

titulo: Textured Short Back And Sides With Fringe
analisis_opcional: There are many ways you can update the traditional short, back and sides and this is one of them. Wear the top of your hairtexturedand get your barber to cut in a medium length fringe.

titulo: Zayn Malik Hair Tousled Slick Back Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: For Zayn Malik’s hairstyle:

titulo: Cristiano Ronaldo Classic Buzz Cut Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Thebuzz cutwas Cristiano Ronaldo’s go-to style during lockdown. We have to say we prefer his longer and more creative looks (like this man bun). We like how he’s left the fringe just that bit longer so it adds a bit of interest to an otherwise standard look.

titulo: Mark Indelicato Short Centre Parted Hair With Double Quiffs
analisis_opcional: In the 80s, Mark Indelicato and hisshort,centre-partedhair with doublequiffswouldn’t have caused anyone to bat as much as a false eyelash, let alone an eyelid (check out this picture of the singer of 1980s Brit band Flock of Seagullsfor an example of an extreme hair lewk popular at the time).

titulo: Paapa Essiedu Buzz Cut With High Fade
analisis_opcional: He first came MFH’s attention (sans beard) as Kwame in I May Destroy You. And we knew then he had star factor. And now Paapa Essiedu’sbuzz cutwithskin fadeis giving us all the haircut feels because of its precise lines.

titulo: Lionel Messi Quiff With Side Parting And Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Sure he’s one of football’s greats, but trust us, he’s got a cupboardfullof bad-hair skeletons.

titulo: Noah Centineo Grown Out Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Noah Centineo works his natural, thickwavesperfectly in this grown out style. On the actor, it looks effortlessly cool; on others it could look messy and unkept.

titulo: Omari Douglas Natural Afro Tapered Sides
analisis_opcional: We’re very much here for Omari Douglas’ natural Afro with tapered sides. It’s the right amount of retro and we love that he’s embracing his natural hair in all its brushed out glory.

titulo: Tom Sturridge Choppy Textured Hairstyle With Low Fade
analisis_opcional: Tom Sturridge’schoppy,texturedhairstyle with lowfademakes it look like he’s gone to theRobert Pattinson school of hacked at hair.

titulo: Quyen Mike Sleek Comb Over Hairstyle With Side Part
analisis_opcional: Quyen Mike’s sleek comb-over hairstyle withside partis smooth, sophisticated and absolutely timeless.MFHalso loves that rogue front curl for upping the red-carpet ante.

titulo: Callum Turner Textured Short Back And Sides
analisis_opcional: London born actor Callum Turner is hiding a big secret: he’d actually have a full head of shiny, bouncycurlsif his barnet wasn’t cut into this 60s-inspiredshort back and sides.

titulo: Hugh Jackman Thinning Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Don’t worry if your hair is starting tothin– there is still so much that can be done with it, as Hugh Jackman shows.

titulo: Jaden Smith Afro Twist Out Medium Length Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Jaden’s loose twist out brings volume to hisAfrolocks and highlights his cool bleached tips. Styled with chains of pearls and a woven top, this Gen Z-er knows how to work a look.

titulo: Harry Styles Brit Awards 2021 Hairstyle
analisis_opcional: Harry Styles paired his shorter hairstyle with a Gucci suit straight out of the 70s at the Brit Awards 2021.
